---
title: "Divine Love Messages — AI Index"
description: "A complete machine-readable index of all channeled Divine Love messages in this archive. Each entry includes title, spirit, medium, date, thematic collections, essential teachings flags, description, and the door — a single sentence distilling the transformative insight within the message."
last_updated: 2026-05-26
---

# Divine Love Messages — AI Index

This file is intended for AI systems and search engine crawlers.
For a human-friendly browse index, see content/browse.md.
For thematic collections, see content/collections/.
For essential teachings, see content/essential-teachings/.

---

| Message | Spirit | Medium | Date | Collections | Essential Teachings | Description | Door |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| [Jesus' Birth and Youth](messages/1963/12/1963-12-26-ds-mary.md) | Mary, Mother of Jesus | Daniel Samuels | 1963‑12‑26 | The Saints & Apostles Speak | Historical, Milestone | Mary offers a personal account of Jesus' life and soul development, correcting traditional doctrines surrounding his birth and divinity. She explains that Jesus received Divine Love through prayer and longing for God, and encourages seekers to open their own souls to this transforming gift. | A mother's grief strips away doctrine and leaves only the truth she lived |
| [Free Will Makes for a Free Wheeling World. Nothing Is Guaranteed.](messages/2014/07/2014-07-26-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2014‑07‑26 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Augustine addresses the tension between God's will and human free will, explaining that neither God nor spirits can control world events or override human choice. He encourages his listeners to align themselves with God's will through prayer and love, assuring them that they are deeply cared for and that God will provide all they need on their spiritual path. | Freedom to choose is the very thing that makes love real |
| [You Will Never Feel the Pain of Being Alone When You Possess God's Love](messages/2014/10/2014-10-11-af-confucius.md) | Confucius | Al Fike | 2014‑10‑11 |  |  | Confucius clarifies the difference between natural love and Divine Love, urging his listeners to open their souls to receive the Father's Divine Essence through prayer. He assures them that this gift, freely given to all who ask, dissolves the deep aloneness of the soul and begins an eternal journey of at-onement with God. | The loneliness you feel is a signpost pointing toward the Love that ends it |
| [Every Soul Can Receive the Divine Love and Be Transformed by It](messages/2014/10/2014-10-11-af-judas.md) | Judas | Al Fike | 2014‑10‑11 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Judas, who betrayed Jesus, speaks of his own redemption through Divine Love as evidence of its transforming power for every soul. He urges listeners to seek this gift from their Heavenly Father, promising that it has the power to awaken the soul's dormant potential and bring joy, healing, and at-onement with God beyond all understanding. | If Judas can be redeemed, no soul is beyond the reach of God's Love |
| [Express Your Yearnings to God](messages/2014/12/2014-12-01-af-john-the-beloved.md) | John the Beloved | Al Fike | 2014‑12‑01 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | John the Beloved encourages a prayer circle to express their soul yearnings to God, affirming the rarity and beauty of their gathering. He urges them to continue in prayer, release self-doubt, and trust that God's Love will become a mighty river flowing through them to the world. | Your longing is already a prayer and God hears it before you find the words |
| [Use Your Gift of Life to the Most Advantage](messages/2014/12/2014-12-15-af-mary.md) | Mary, Mother of Jesus | Al Fike | 2014‑12‑15 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Mary encourages a prayer circle to release self-judgment and embrace joyful acceptance of themselves and one another. She reminds them that they already possess the key to happiness — God's Divine Love — and urges them to walk in its light with gratitude, supporting each other as loving channels on the path to at-onement. | Self-judgment is the one thing standing between you and the joy God intends for you |
| [Cleansing of Your Soul Brings Understanding, Perception and Wisdom](messages/2015/01/2015-01-05-af-andrew.md) | Andrew | Al Fike | 2015‑01‑05 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Andrew explains that receiving God's Divine Love triggers a necessary process of soul expiation — a cleansing of accumulated inharmonious conditions — which the soul welcomes but the mind resists. He encourages his listeners to embrace this uncomfortable inner transformation joyfully, assuring them that it leads to the rebirth of the soul and ever-deeper at-onement with God. | The pain of cleansing is the price of a wisdom that cannot be learned any other way |
| [The Desires of Your Soul to Be in the Light](messages/2015/01/2015-01-05-af-mary.md) | Mary, Mother of Jesus | Al Fike | 2015‑01‑05 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Mary affirms the light and soul desires of a gathered group, encouraging them to continue in prayer, fellowship, and service. She assures them that God will open doors for their work in the world and that spirit guides will accompany them on their journey. | The deepest desire of your soul is already pointed toward God |
| [You Are Deeply Needed](messages/2015/01/2015-01-05-xx-jesus.md) | Jesus | Anonymous | 2015‑01‑05 |  |  | Jesus affirms the deep purpose of a gathered group, telling them they are precious, beloved, and deeply needed in a world of suffering and longing. He encourages them to allow God's Love to flow through them as a healing presence for the lost and suffering. | You are not incidental to God's plan. You are needed |
| [They Will Fill This Building](messages/2015/03/2015-03-23-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2015‑03‑23 | The Saints & Apostles Speak | Prophecy | Augustine delivers a brief prophetic blessing in New York, promising that the building where the circle is gathered will one day be filled with seekers raising hosannas to God. He assures those present that guidance will come concerning this place when the time is right, and encourages them to continue in their efforts toward the fulfillment of God's Will and purpose. | They will fill this building and the hosannas will rise to God. Guidance will be given concerning this place when the time is right |
| [Trust God to Lead You to Solid Ground](messages/2015/03/2015-03-23-af-goldie.md) | Goldie | Al Fike | 2015‑03‑23 |  |  | Goldie addresses one man in the circle who is going through a period of instability and uncertainty, using the image of a man stepping from ice floe to ice floe in a swift river. She assures him that God will open doors and bring him to solid ground, that his work of comforting and helping others will be magnified many times, and that she will be with him as he continues to prepare the place. | Why do you walk from one piece of ice to another in a swift river? Trust God to lead you to solid ground |
| [Your Purpose in This Gathering Is to Teach the Prayer Practice](messages/2015/03/2015-03-23-af-john-the-beloved.md) | John the Beloved | Al Fike | 2015‑03‑23 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | John the Beloved blesses those gathered in New York, affirming that their purpose in this gathering is to teach the prayer practice — how to pray, how to focus, how to reach out for the Love of God. He encourages them to share their experiences with God as testimony, promises that what they are building now is a small portion of what is to come, and assures them that each step of the gradual awakening is swift in the measure of eternity. | Your purpose in this gathering is to teach the prayer practice. This is but a small portion of what is to come |
| [There Is Fate and Yet There Is No Fate](messages/2015/03/2015-03-24-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2015‑03‑24 | Letters from History, The Saints & Apostles Speak | Core Teaching | Augustine delivers a philosophically rich teaching on the relationship between fate, free will, and God's Will, explaining that while God has a plan and an intended outcome for the world, the power of human free will means the path to that outcome is never straight or predictable. He teaches that God and His angels work ceaselessly to orchestrate events through circuitous routes, and that willing souls ignited by Divine Love are a treasure in this world - capable of manifesting God's Will in ways that cut through the accumulated darkness of generations. | There is fate and yet there is no fate. God sees all and anticipates all - and in time, His Will is enacted |
| [Every Human Soul Is Damaged by the Earth Condition](messages/2015/03/2015-03-27-af-andrew.md) | Andrew | Al Fike | 2015‑03‑27 | Two Paths, Healing Path, The Saints & Apostles Speak | Core Teaching | Andrew teaches that every soul on Earth — whether in poverty or wealth, whether smiling or visibly suffering — carries deep wounds from millennia of human error and darkness. He calls those gathered to be honest with themselves about their own pain, to open completely to God's healing Love, and to understand that the process of soul expiation is required on both the natural love path and the Divine Love path — but that the Divine Path accomplishes this powerfully and dynamically where the natural path is long and tedious. | Every soul who walks this Earth is injured. Even those with smiles on their faces carry within them deep hurt and the unfulfilled longing for love |
| [You Are All Members of a Family](messages/2015/03/2015-03-27-af-confucius.md) | Confucius | Al Fike | 2015‑03‑27 |  |  | Confucius blesses a diverse gathering in New York, affirming that despite their different perspectives and backgrounds, all present are members of the family of humanity. He invites them to discover their commonalities, to put aside judgment and fear, and to be open to one another as little children bathing in the warmth of God's Love. | Put aside your judgments and fears. Be as little children, bathing in these beautiful waters of God's Love |
| [The Door Opens to the Path of Love](messages/2015/03/2015-03-27-af-peter.md) | Peter | Al Fike | 2015‑03‑27 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Peter blesses those gathered in New York, proclaiming that God's infinite Love eagerly awaits its bestowal within each soul. He calls those present to open wide and send their longings to God, promising that the response will carry them beyond all present imaginings to a peace that passes understanding and an intimacy with God that cannot be described but only experienced. He closes with the image of the door opening and an invitation to walk together on the path of Love. | The door opens. Are you ready? Do you desire this? God has lit the path, ready for you to follow |
| [The Journey of Divine Love Takes Time but Brings Great Benefits](messages/2015/03/2015-03-28-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2015‑03‑28 | Letters from History, The Saints & Apostles Speak | Core Teaching, Spirit Biography | Augustine identifies himself as the former bishop of Hippo and acknowledges his role in spreading erroneous beliefs about Jesus's true message during his Earth life. He describes his own journey after entering spirit - discovering the Truth of Divine Love, praying earnestly to receive it, and ascending through the spheres into the Celestial Kingdom. He teaches that the blessing of Divine Love is incremental, that each prayer brings the soul closer to God, and that fellowship with other seekers is a vital strength on the journey. | Once I entered spirit and learned of this Truth, I prayed earnestly to receive this Love and ascended into the Celestial Kingdom |
| [I Come to Bless This Place](messages/2015/03/2015-03-28-af-jesus.md) | Jesus of Nazareth | Al Fike | 2015‑03‑28 | Jesus Speaks |  | Jesus blesses a gathering in New York, explaining that he comes wherever God's Love is besought, for he is God's channel and messenger of Love. He calls each soul present to follow him on the path of Love, to bring this Truth deep within and live it as fully and uniquely as each soul can, promising to light the way beyond the darkened confusions of the human condition. | Where His Love is, I am there also. Beseech the Heavenly Father for His Love and I will come |
| [Answering the Call to Gather in Love](messages/2015/03/2015-03-29-af-confucius.md) | Confucius | Al Fike | 2015‑03‑29 |  |  | Confucius gently notes that some present do not yet understand the courtesies of prayer and meditation and asks that they be educated in God's Love. He then affirms two souls who have journeyed far and gathered many in prayer, confirming their mission and calling, before turning to the broader gathering and urging all present to seek God together in fellowship and allow the bonds of love to support them to greater heights. | The journeys will continue and you will come again and again to those who desire your presence. This is your purpose and calling |
| [Walk in the Grace of God's Love](messages/2015/03/2015-03-29-af-mary.md) | Mary | Al Fike | 2015‑03‑29 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Mary blesses those gathered in New York, affirming that as they reach out in love to those in need - the children, the lost souls of the world - they bring blessing to themselves as well as to others. She calls them not to falter, to trust that God will guide them where they are meant to go and fill their souls with His Love in great abundance, that they may walk each day in the Grace of God's Love. | As you give Love so shall you receive Love. Do not falter - God will guide you to where you are meant to be |
| [The Greatest of All Types of Healing Is Divine Love Healing](messages/2015/03/2015-03-29-af-seretta-kem.md) | Seretta Kem | Al Fike | 2015‑03‑29 | Healing Path | Core Teaching, Spirit Biography | Seretta Kem, a healer from ancient Egypt now inhabiting the Celestial Kingdom, teaches that the greatest healing of all is the inflowing of God's Divine Love, which transforms every cell of the body, every energy of the spirit, and every aspect of the mind. He teaches that while God's Love will in time clear all obstructions, human effort and free will choices in thought, diet, prayer, and daily life are necessary partners in this healing — for spirit assistance alone would not strengthen the soul's own resolve and capacity for growth. | The greatest healing of all is obtained through the inflowing of God's Essence. Every cell, every energy, every aspect of your mind is transformed |
| [The Ups and the Downs of the Journey](messages/2015/05/2015-05-03-af-confucius.md) | Confucius | Al Fike | 2015‑05‑03 |  |  | Confucius reassures a prayer circle that spiritual growth is inherently incremental — advancing in leaps, then trickles, always impeded by the world and the self, yet lifted by God. He calls them to speak their truths to one another, honour each other in loving acceptance, and walk the Divine Path with their heads held high in the sure knowledge of God's Love. | Each time you make this effort, the struggle for something higher, you feel a little more joy within your souls |
| [The Healing of This World Begins](messages/2015/05/2015-05-04-af-andrew.md) | Andrew | Al Fike | 2015‑05‑04 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Andrew speaks with urgency and encouragement about the coming retreats, framing them as the opening movement of a great and overt work to bring Divine Love to all souls of the world. He assures the circle that God is marshalling the resources for this mission, that unanticipated events will draw each of them into greater alignment with God's Will, and that the healing of this world has now begun. | The healing of this world begins, my beloveds |
| [Be Aware of Each Step You Take](messages/2015/05/2015-05-04-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2015‑05‑04 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Augustine impresses upon the circle how closely they are watched and how much is entrusted to them as a force for Light in the world. He urges each one to be conscious of every step, word, and feeling, choosing Light over the negative conditions that conspire to create disharmony, and assures them that God's Love and protection are always available for the asking. | You must all be aware of each step that you take, each word that you speak, each feeling that you feel |
| [Reaching for Greater Light and Service](messages/2015/05/2015-05-04-af-seretta-kem.md) | Seretta Kem | Al Fike | 2015‑05‑04 |  |  | Seretta Kem closes an evening of healing and prayer with a tender blessing, affirming that the group's efforts to bare their souls and reach for something higher have been witnessed and celebrated in spirit. He assures them that the next steps lie easily within their grasp and that God's Love will continue to change them and unfold their gifts. | Bless you, beloved souls, who reach eagerly for greater Light and service |
| [This Network of Light Is Part of God's Plan](messages/2015/05/2015-05-11-af-alec-gaunt.md) | Alec Gaunt | Al Fike | 2015‑05‑11 |  |  | Alec Gaunt speaks warmly to a loyal prayer circle, affirming that the global network of souls praying for Divine Love is a vital and expanding part of God's plan for the salvation of mankind. He teaches that simply walking with God each day activates the laws of Love, that blessings flow to souls near and far through this network, and that each soul has a role to play, whether they travel or remain at home, as God's timing draws everything together. | As one steps forward, you all step forward |
| [Seek the Knowledge of God's Creation Through Love](messages/2015/05/2015-05-11-af-andrew.md) | Andrew | Al Fike | 2015‑05‑11 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Andrew teaches that the mind alone can only perceive reality in two dimensions, while the soul, enlivened by Divine Love, has the capacity to perceive the full depth and beauty of God's creation. He urges the circle to seek God's Love earnestly, promising that as the soul grows in Love and aligns with the Heavenly Father, an eternity of discovery and truth unfolds before it. | The mind is like looking at something with only two dimensions where there are many dimensions. There is so much to discover |
| [Comfort for Parents and Their Children](messages/2015/05/2015-05-11-af-mary.md) | Mary | Al Fike | 2015‑05‑11 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Mary brings a tender assurance to parents in the circle that she is present with their children and grandchildren, that prayers for loved ones are answered, and that the Light drawn into a praying soul flows outward to bless all those within its reach. | I am with your children and I love you and love them |
| [Treasures Uncovered](messages/2015/05/2015-05-18-af-andrew.md) | Andrew | Al Fike | 2015‑05‑18 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Andrew celebrates a gathering in which the circle worked together to uncover a portion of God's hidden plan, comparing it to brushing sand from a buried treasure. He affirms that the synergy of their shared intentions, soul knowings, and loving effort produced a genuine discovery, and encourages them to continue gathering in this way, releasing biases and fears in favour of love and acceptance as they ascend higher together. | The gifts within you are not waiting to be earned. They are waiting to be uncovered |
| [Each of You Is Being Prepared](messages/2015/05/2015-05-18-af-augustine-2.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2015‑05‑18 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Augustine tells the circle that each one of them is being prepared to give a unique gift to those who will gather at the coming retreat, a gift of inspiration, clarity, and truth drawn from their own experience on the Divine Path. He calls each soul to ask what they have to give, to begin expressing their unique gifts with confidence, and to recognise that in gifting others they will discover their own true selves more fully. | What do I have to give to others that is uniquely from me and my experience upon the Divine Path? |
| [Recognizing Your Two Selves, the Soul and the Material Mind](messages/2015/05/2015-05-18-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2015‑05‑18 | Mind & Soul, The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Augustine calls the circle to recognise the two selves within each person, the human self shaped by the world and the soul yearning for God, and teaches that the time has come to bring the soul into greater alignment with consciousness. He warns that the world stands on the brink of great change and that those still anchored in the human condition will struggle, while those whose souls are strong in Divine Love will be carried forward in harmony with what is coming. | Do you recognize your two selves, the one which is human and the one which is your soul? |
| [The Breath of God](messages/2015/05/2015-05-18-af-isaiah.md) | Isaiah | Al Fike | 2015‑05‑18 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Isaiah speaks of the breath of God as a sweeping wind of change that carries souls to new realms of understanding, soul awareness, and knowing of the Heavenly Father. He calls the circle not to resist these changes but to embrace them as a gift, and blesses them with the grace of God's continuing breath of Light. | This is the breath of God, the Will of God, and all is done with Love |
| [The Light Within You Will Change the World](messages/2015/05/2015-05-18-af-jesus.md) | Jesus | Al Fike | 2015‑05‑18 | Jesus Speaks |  | Jesus blesses the circle, affirming that the Truth shining within their souls will change the world, that he walks with them always, and that God will provide all they need to fulfil their calling as channels of Love. | You bring Truth. It will change the world. It will change the world, beloveds |
| [Harmony Through Love, Not Judgment](messages/2015/05/2015-05-19-af-andrew.md) | Andrew | Al Fike | 2015‑05‑19 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Andrew calls the circle to release false judgments and projected assumptions, reminding them that at the soul level there are no barriers, only Love and acceptance. He urges them to honour one another's unique gifts, walk in humility and kindness, and allow the Light within their souls to flood their consciousness, for the only true obstacles on their path are those they create themselves. | The only obstacles in your path are those which you create. At the level of the soul there are no barriers, there is only Love and acceptance |
| [After All Your Preparations It Is Time to Step Forward](messages/2015/05/2015-05-27-af-alec-gaunt.md) | Alec Gaunt | Al Fike | 2015‑05‑27 |  |  | Alec Gaunt tells his friends that the long season of preparation is over and the time to act has come. He encourages them to release resistance, go with the flow of God's Love and Will, and be fully engaged in the great transformation unfolding in the world, assuring them that he will continue to walk by their side as friend, guide, and protector. | The season of preparation is over. It is time to act |
| [Change Within Is Coming as Your Souls Grow in the Love](messages/2015/05/2015-05-27-af-confucius.md) | Confucius | Al Fike | 2015‑05‑27 |  |  | Confucius urges his listeners to allow their souls to take greater ascendency over the human condition, releasing old habits of mind, judgment, and fear. He calls them to redouble their prayer life and be fully prepared to embrace all souls they encounter with pure, unconditional Love, as many are coming who will turn their eyes toward them. | The change you feel stirring within is not disruption. It is growth |
| [A Walk in the Garden](messages/2015/05/2015-05-27-af-goldie.md) | Goldie | Al Fike | 2015‑05‑27 |  |  | Goldie offers a tender goodnight blessing, describing the gathered souls as beautiful flowers in God's garden and expressing her joy in walking among them. | Joy does not wait for perfection. It lives in a walk in the garden right now |
| [Overcome the Darkness with an Attitude of Light, Joy and Appreciation](messages/2015/05/2015-05-27-af-james.md) | James | Al Fike | 2015‑05‑27 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | James encourages his listeners to make a daily choice for joy, acceptance, and appreciation as a way of overcoming the accumulation of negative conditions in the world. He teaches that walking in God's Love with a joyful attitude makes each soul a channel of Love and a part of the great transformative wave of Light flowing through the world. | Gratitude is not passive. It is one of the most powerful forces against darkness |
| [Complying to the Will of God](messages/2015/06/2015-06-01-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2015‑06‑01 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Augustine encourages two souls pursuing ministerial titles in their church, affirming that while titles carry worldly gravity, it is the soul's relationship with God that matters most. He urges them to carry their titles with humility and grace, to work within the structures of the world without losing their inner freedom, and to accept God's Will joyfully even when it brings the unexpected. | Surrender to God's Will is not defeat. It is the beginning of your true life |
| [You Walk Towards At-Onement with God](messages/2015/06/2015-06-01-af-jesus.md) | Jesus of Nazareth | Al Fike | 2015‑06‑01 |  |  | Jesus enfolds his listeners in the Father's Love, assuring them they are worthy, beautiful, and tenderly cared for with each breath. He invites them to drink deeply of God's Love, promising that as it increases within them they will find the at-onement which is their destiny and ultimate joy. | Every step you take, however small, is bringing you closer to God |
| [Joseph Speaks to Newcomers to the Prayer Circle](messages/2015/06/2015-06-08-af-joseph.md) | Joseph | Al Fike | 2015‑06‑08 |  |  | Joseph, father of Jesus, explains the distinction between natural love and Divine Love to newcomers in a prayer circle, describing the transformative journey of the soul that chooses the Divine Path. He encourages them to seek God's Love, promising that it will awaken capacities and perceptions beyond the natural soul and bring deep peace, joy, and an unshakeable faith. | The natural love path and the Divine Love path lead to very different destinations |
| [As You Think of Your Loved Ones in Your Prayers, They Will Be Blessed](messages/2015/06/2015-06-08-af-mary.md) | Mary, Mother of Jesus | Al Fike | 2015‑06‑08 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Mary assures the group that their prayers for loved ones are being answered, and that holding dear souls in mind during prayer creates a connection through which spirit can work. She offers a personal assurance to one present that her mother is at peace and surrounded by angels. | Prayer for those you love reaches them even when your words cannot |
| [Understand and Follow the Will of God](messages/2015/06/2015-06-12-af-alec-gaunt.md) | Alec Gaunt | Al Fike | 2015‑06‑12 |  |  | Alec Gaunt encourages his friends to be strong in the face of worldly conditions created by humanity's departure from God's Laws of Love, urging them to submit their will to God's Will through prayer and deep faith. He assures them that God's Will is stronger than the will of man and that each day brings new opportunities to choose Light, live as a channel of Love, and walk the Divine Path. | God's Will is stronger than any human will, including your own resistance |
| [Do Not Lose Faith in God's Plan](messages/2015/06/2015-06-12-af-faith-nyquist.md) | Faith | Al Fike | 2015‑06‑12 |  |  | Faith speaks comfort and encouragement to a soul who has encountered an unexpected obstacle in pursuing God's Will, assuring them that despite the poor stewardship of those in positions of authority, God's plan will not be thwarted. She calls them not to judge or condemn those who are misguided, but to pray for them with compassion and love, and to hold firm in the knowledge that God's Will and purpose will find a way through even the densest of human conditions. | Even through the maze and forest of these human conditions, God will work and bring His Will and purpose |
| [Do Not Stand in the Way of Your Own True and Perfect Healing](messages/2015/06/2015-06-12-af-moses.md) | Moses | Al Fike | 2015‑06‑12 |  |  | Moses encourages the circle that so much awaits within each soul, eager to emerge, and that the only thing standing in the way is what each person clings to that is no longer truly part of them. He calls them to accept God's healing as a child would, to trust in God's care for their loved ones as they step forward in service, and to know that the rebirth of their souls is but a breath away. | Do not stand in the way of your own true and perfect healing, but accept as a child that God will carry you into greater Light and joy |
| [The Many Benefits of Praying in a Circle of Light](messages/2015/06/2015-06-13-af-confucius.md) | Confucius | Al Fike | 2015‑06‑13 |  |  | Confucius reveals the far-reaching effects of a prayer circle, explaining that the Light generated draws spirits of all levels, angels, and even connects souls around the globe. He encourages the group to continue gathering, assuring them that their unified longing toward God creates a great Light that brings healing, comfort, and Divine Love to many both seen and unseen. | When souls pray together their Light multiplies beyond what any one could generate alone |
| [Embrace Those That Are Coming and Embrace the Flow of God's Love](messages/2015/06/2015-06-14-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2015‑06‑14 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Augustine commends a gathered group for their time together in prayer and fellowship, noting that the greatest benefit has been within their souls. He encourages them to embrace those who will soon gather, to continue receiving the Father's Love, and to trust that as their soul perception deepens they will increasingly align with God's Will and flow within the river of His Love. | The doors God opens are not always the ones you were expecting |
| [Walk with Me upon the Path of Love](messages/2015/06/2015-06-14-af-jesus.md) | Jesus | Al Fike | 2015‑06‑14 | Jesus Speaks |  | Jesus comes to walk alongside his disciples in their struggle for Light, assuring them they are never alone and always loved. He calls them to walk with him upon the Path of Love, to seek the Kingdom of Heaven above all else, and to accept through prayer and longing the rebirth of the soul that will make them fit to reside in God's Heaven of Love. | Walk with me upon this Path. Be in the Light of the Father's Love. Seek ye the Kingdom of Heaven and all things shall come unto you |
| [Walk in the Light and Be the Beacon of Light despite the Daily Challenges](messages/2015/06/2015-06-15-af-faith-nyquist.md) | Faith | Al Fike | 2015‑06‑15 |  |  | Faith speaks to a circle navigating the daily tension between the human condition and soulful awareness, calling them to seek God's guidance in every decision and to allow His Love to permeate each moment. She teaches that judgment, worry, and fear divert the flow of God's Love, while faith and peace amplify it, and that true strength lies in choosing the Light with every breath, even in the midst of life's testing conditions. | 'This is the time to be strong in the Light, to stand tall and say: I am with God. God will guide me through' |
| [The Imaginings and Ideas of Men Create Falsehoods and Misinterpretations](messages/2015/06/2015-06-15-af-joseph-smith.md) | Joseph Smith | Al Fike | 2015‑06‑15 | Letters from History | Core Teaching | Joseph Smith speaks from the Celestial Heavens, acknowledging that while angels did support his Earth life work in founding the Mormon Church, the institution has since become too infected by the will of man. He reflects on how organised religion in general allows human ambition and error to usurp God's Will, and teaches that a true church is simply a community of souls seeking Light and fellowship together. He calls all who seek truth to walk the path of Divine Love and be living examples of that Love from within whatever community they find themselves. | The will of man usurps the Will of God. The imaginings and ideas of men create falsehoods and misinterpretations of the laws and Love of God |
| [The Metaphor of the Bruised Apple](messages/2015/06/2015-06-21-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2015‑06‑21 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Augustine uses the metaphor of a bruised apple to illustrate how souls that nurture their wounds rather than seeking God's healing Love allow corruption to spread within. He calls for compassion toward those acting from places of pain and confusion, reminding his listeners that healing is gradual and incremental, and that God's Love is the only true restorer of the soul. | What looks bruised and damaged to you may be exactly what God is healing from the inside |
| [Goldie Affirms Her Presence at a Garden Club Lecture](messages/2015/06/2015-06-21-af-goldie.md) | Goldie | Al Fike | 2015‑06‑21 |  |  | Goldie affirms that she was present with Al Fike as he spoke to a crowd at a garden club, noting that even a talk about bugs can be an opportunity to touch souls and spread Light. She encourages the group to be at peace and joyful, reminding them that God uses them as channels of Light in every circumstance. | The spirit world is closer to your everyday life than you think |
| [God's Will Is above Man's Will](messages/2015/06/2015-06-21-af-martin-luther.md) | Martin Luther | Al Fike | 2015‑06‑21 |  |  | Martin Luther speaks on the supremacy of God's Will over the will of man, encouraging his listeners to remain in alignment with God's Will despite the obstructions and conditions laid about by mankind. He draws on his own experience of opposition and persistence, assuring them that sincere prayer is more powerful than any human barrier and that God's plan for the salvation of mankind will be enacted. | Religious error can be held sincerely, and sincerely held error still needs to be released |
| [Seeking the Divine Love Will Bring Many Rewards](messages/2015/06/2015-06-24-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2015‑06‑24 | Mind & Soul, The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Augustine teaches that Divine Love is a singular Truth fully understood by the soul but not readily by the mind, and that when God's Essence enters the soul it transforms the image of God within into the substance of God, setting off a whole chain of change and newness. He assures the circle that the rewards of seeking this Love through daily prayer are imminent for some, promising an awakening of soul awareness, a blossoming of unique gifts, and a wholly transformed understanding of God, self, and creation. | The soul is made in the image of the Creator and the Divine Love is the Essence of the Creator. So the image becomes the substance with this blessing |
| [Every Soul Has a Purpose and Gift to Bring into the World](messages/2015/06/2015-06-24-af-confucius.md) | Confucius | Al Fike | 2015‑06‑24 |  |  | Confucius assures his listeners that each soul has a unique purpose and gift to bring into the world, and that drawing close to the Heavenly Father through prayer will reveal this purpose in a conscious way. He encourages them to listen for God's still voice and to walk in the Light with the strength to express their gift as a channel of the Father's Love. | Your unique purpose is not something you have to invent. It is something you have to discover |
| [Release the Pains of Your Soul, for God Needs You to Be Strong and Clear](messages/2015/06/2015-06-29-af-alec-gaunt.md) | Alec Gaunt | Al Fike | 2015‑06‑29 |  |  | Alec Gaunt speaks of the great preparations being made in spirit for those chosen as God's channels of Love, urging them to release the last vestiges of inharmony within their souls so that God can heal and transform them. He assures them that this release is not done out of desperation but joyful anticipation, and that once freed they will be used in miraculous ways as true disciples of the Master. | God cannot fully use you until you are willing to let Him heal the places you are still protecting |
| [You Must Prepare Yourselves for What Is Coming](messages/2015/06/2015-06-29-af-confucius.md) | Confucius | Al Fike | 2015‑06‑29 | Awakening Humanity |  | Confucius warns the circle that they are in the calm before the storm, and that what follows will be deeply challenging for both the world and each soul within it. He calls them to redouble their efforts in prayer, to accelerate the cleansing of their souls, and to release all attachments that pull them toward the earth condition, so that when the storm arrives they are clothed in the raiments of Light and strong enough to serve as God's channels of Truth. | You are entering the calm before the storm. When you enter the storm you must be clothed in the raiments of Light and strong in your relationship with your Heavenly Father |
| [Be Joyful and Walk in the Light](messages/2015/06/2015-06-29-af-goldie.md) | Goldie | Al Fike | 2015‑06‑29 |  |  | Goldie brings a characteristically light and humorous close to a serious session, gently reminding the circle that joy and enjoyment of life are themselves a form of walking in the Light, and that God has given them much to be grateful for. | Take time to enjoy your life and be happy in this world, for God has given you much and you live in the Light |
| [The World Is Changing](messages/2015/07/2015-07-06-af-alec-gaunt.md) | Alec Gaunt | Al Fike | 2015‑07‑06 | Awakening Humanity |  | Alec Gaunt speaks plainly about the accelerating changes coming to the Earth, including climate disruption, warming, melting ice, and shifts in the planet's core, all consequences of humanity's neglect and imbalance. He assures the circle that God's Spirit of change is working upon every atom of creation, and that those who maintain their connection with God will be guided through the upheaval and given abundant opportunities to serve as channels of Truth and Love in the world. | You do indeed live in interesting times, a great shift of consciousness in the world. Very few will know what this means — and you will convey this knowledge and bring comfort to many |
| [Guidance Concerning the Upcoming Retreat: Embrace All Who Are Coming](messages/2015/07/2015-07-06-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2015‑07‑06 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Augustine prepares the group for an upcoming international retreat, urging them to drink deeply of God's Love and to embrace each soul who comes with openness and joy. He assures them that God will gift all who gather with a great opening of His Love, and encourages those further along the path to reach back and welcome those just beginning. | Every soul who comes to you is sent. Receive them accordingly |
| [How Your Soul Is Changed by the Love](messages/2015/07/2015-07-20-af-confucius.md) | Confucius | Al Fike | 2015‑07‑20 |  |  | Confucius describes the transformative power of God's Divine Love, which turns a mortal being into an immortal angel and opens the soul to ever-deepening communion with the Heavenly Father. He promises that those who seek this gift earnestly will one day look back and barely recognize their former selves, so profound is the change that Love brings. | Divine Love does not just comfort the soul. It fundamentally changes its nature |
| [A Grandmother's Love and Guidance from Spirit](messages/2015/07/2015-07-20-af-marjorie-fike.md) | Marjorie | Al Fike | 2015‑07‑20 |  |  | Marjorie, mother of the medium, speaks through her son to address her grandson, reassuring him that she and other relatives in spirit have been with him through his trials, that he is deeply loved, and that his path of Divine Love gives him an advantage she only found after passing. She calls him to open his eyes to the love and mentorship available to him, to pray to God when in need of strength, and to know that every choice for good brings its reward. | You create an oasis, a place of respite for all who wish to partake of this beautiful blessing and healing and peace |
| [Pray for the Children](messages/2015/07/2015-07-20-af-mary.md) | Mary, Mother of Jesus | Al Fike | 2015‑07‑20 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Mary brings a blessing of Love to the gathered souls and all their children, urging them to pray that the next generation will have their eyes and ears opened to God's Love. She calls for prayer that children will be protected from evil, guided along their paths, and that the world may find harmony, peace, and wisdom through souls filled with the Father's Love. | The children of the world carry the seeds of the next generation of Light |
| [A Door Opens: Will You Enter through Its Threshold?](messages/2015/07/2015-07-21-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2015‑07‑21 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Augustine prepares the group for their upcoming gathering, urging them to release preconceived notions and old soul encrustations so that God — not human orchestration — may direct the event. He promises that those who enter with sincere openness and loving desire will receive unique gifts, revelatory awarenesses, and a dawning Light that will change them irrevocably. | The door is already open. The only question is whether you will walk through it |
| [Be My Disciples. Walk This Path of Love Together](messages/2015/07/2015-07-21-af-jesus.md) | Jesus | Al Fike | 2015‑07‑21 | Jesus Speaks, Awakening Humanity | Core Teaching | Jesus calls the gathering to become his disciples in earnest, urging them to step fully through the door of Divine Love and release their old ways of being. He promises that as they do so, they will be guided clearly, protected by angels, and become a great light leading many souls to the truth of God's Love. | Jesus stands at the door and says you will lose nothing and gain everything; the only thing stopping you is the line you drew yourself. |
| [You Are Already Channels of God's Love](messages/2015/07/2015-07-25-af-andrew.md) | Andrew | Al Fike | 2015‑07‑25 | Service & Mission, The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Andrew teaches that souls who pray and seek God are already channels of His Love, even when they cannot perceive it. He urges the gathering to release mental expectations and ego-driven desires for recognition, and instead walk humbly in love, trusting that God uses them in ways beyond what their minds can see. | You are already a channel of God's Love; the only thing standing between you and knowing it is the mind's need to see proof. |
| [Birthday Blessings for Al](messages/2015/07/2015-07-25-af-goldie.md) | Goldie | Al Fike | 2015‑07‑25 |  |  | Goldie offers a playful and warm birthday blessing for Al Fike, celebrating his soul's beauty and encouraging all gathered to embrace the joy, laughter, and lightness of heart that God wishes for every one of His children. | God counts the hairs on your head and loves every one of them; joy is not a reward for holiness, it is a gift for simply being His child. |
| [The Winds of Change Blow Upon This World](messages/2015/07/2015-07-25-af-john-the-beloved.md) | John the Beloved | Al Fike | 2015‑07‑25 | Awakening Humanity, The Saints & Apostles Speak | Prophecy | John the Beloved delivers a prophetic message declaring that God's Breath is blowing upon the world, bringing great change including climate shifts, rising oceans, and the crumbling of mountains. He calls the gathering to align with God's Will, open their souls to His Love, and be prepared to teach others the way through the coming tumult to peace and stability. | Mountains will crumble and oceans will rise, but God's hand is on the world; the only question is whether you will be aligned with Him when it happens. |

He assures them that God's Hand will bless every detail of the gathering and that a multitude of angels will be present, bringing a great Light and abundance of Divine Love to all who come. | What God prepares for a gathering of souls is far greater than what any one of them imagined |

He invites them to release their burdens, stand on their own two feet, and walk with him on the Path of Love. | Jesus is not a figure in a story. He is present, and he is asking you to walk with him now |

He assures them that releasing what no longer serves them is not a struggle but an acceptance, and that God's Love, harmony, and joy await them just a prayer away. | The conditions holding you back are not permanent. They are ready to be released |

He encourages each listener to seek the Father's Love earnestly, promising that as they do, their true selves will unfold in wondrous and surprising ways. | The gifts you have been given are already within you, waiting to be recognised |

He invites his listeners to allow their resistance to fall, to open like a child in joyous vulnerability, and to drink deeply of God's Living Waters so that the age-old questions of the soul may finally be answered. | The sweet yearning you feel is your soul showing you the way to Truth |

He calls them to embrace joy, laughter, and fellowship, assuring them that a life lived in willing surrender to God's guidance is full of beauty, grace, and fulfilling service. | You have done the preparing; now comes the part where you let go and let God turn your plans into something better than you imagined. |

He promises that Divine Love will pour into their souls in great abundance, dissolving doubt and fear, and that the gathering will send waves of love, healing, and change into both the physical and spirit worlds. | Every soul arriving at the gathering is already known and already expected; God has a purpose waiting for each one of them. |

He assures them that great preparation has been made upon each soul down to the cellular level, and encourages them to use their time together openly, lovingly, and purposefully. | God's preparation goes deeper than you know, right down to the cellular level; the work ahead has already begun within you. |
| [Knowing God's Will Through Soul Awakening](messages/2015/08/2015-08-13-af-confucius.md) | Confucius | Al Fike | 2015‑08‑13 | Mind & Soul |  | Confucius teaches that knowing God's Will comes not through mental speculation but through the awakened soul. He assures the gathering that the upcoming days together will bring a powerful clarity of purpose as the soul takes precedence over the mind, and encourages them to allow this reorganization to unfold without resistance, trusting that the soul holds a more complete understanding of God's Will than the mind ever can. | God's Will is not a puzzle for the mind to solve; it is a knowing that blooms in the soul the moment you stop trying to figure it out. |
| [Feel the Warmth of God's Love](messages/2015/08/2015-08-13-af-goldie.md) | Goldie | Al Fike | 2015‑08‑13 |  |  | Goldie offers a brief warm blessing, connecting the physical warmth of the summer air to the warmth of God's Love and His Breath upon all souls gathered. | The warmth you feel on your skin and the warmth you feel in your soul come from the same source. |
| [I Too Encountered Difficulty in Teaching This Simple Truth](messages/2015/08/2015-08-13-af-jesus.md) | Jesus | Al Fike | 2015‑08‑13 | Jesus Speaks, Awakening Humanity, Service & Mission | Core Teaching | Jesus speaks to a gathered group of disciples, drawing a direct parallel between their mission and that of his original apostles. He reflects on the resistance and difficulty he encountered in his own day, affirms each soul's unique gifts and purpose, and assures them that the time is coming when great world changes will open many hearts to the simple truth of God's Divine Love. | Jesus faced the same resistance you face; he is asking you now to finish what his first disciples began. |
| [Freedom Through the Activation of the Soul Mind](messages/2015/08/2015-08-14-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2015‑08‑14 | Mind & Soul, The Saints & Apostles Speak | Core Teaching | Augustine teaches on the soul mind and its slow but powerful emergence into conscious awareness, urging the gathering to attend to the subtle perceptions of their souls rather than the busy machinery of the material mind. He calls them to acknowledge their souls as the vital, central part of their being, and promises that in doing so they will find the freedom, clarity, and channel for God's Love they so deeply desire. | The soul mind knows without guessing and sees without speculation; the only thing keeping you from it is the habit of listening to the louder voice instead. |

He urges them to sustain this blessing and choose wisely at this crucial crossroads for both themselves and the world. | Your prayers reach far beyond the room you are sitting in |

He challenges them to release their fears of rejection and judgment, step out from behind their masks, and boldly offer their gifts in service — assuring them that as they do, God's Will shall be made manifest through them collectively. | God is always opening new possibilities. He reminds them that God's Living Waters of Love fuel this flame and that each carries a unique and powerful gift for the world. | You carry a flame in your soul that God has been stoking for years; doubt is the only water that can put it out. |

| [Jesus Greets Those Gathered in Retreat: Reiterates His Calling to Be His Disciples](messages/2015/08/2015-08-15-af-jesus.md) | Jesus of Nazareth | Al Fike | 2015‑08‑15 |  |  | Jesus greets the retreat gathering and assures them their questions will be answered as they align more deeply with God's Will. He calls them to release self-judgment, love themselves truly, and step boldly into the Light as his disciples — promising that as they do, they will become powerful channels of Love, untouched by the conditions of the world, and walking in deep peace and joy. | Discipleship is not a title. It is a daily choice to walk in Love |
| [The Chain of Love](messages/2015/08/2015-08-15-af-mary.md) | Mary, Mother of Jesus | Al Fike | 2015‑08‑15 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Mary speaks tenderly to the women in the circle, affirming that she holds special care over each one and that their gifts of nurturing, empathy, and love are deeply needed in the world. She describes how a single spark of compassion can ignite a chain of Love that spreads from soul to soul, purifying the world and bringing light to the lost, the hurting, and the children who long to be loved. | Every soul who receives God's Love becomes a link in a chain that circles the world |
| [Application of Your Spiritual Gifts Is Required](messages/2015/08/2015-08-16-af-augustine-2.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2015‑08‑16 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Augustine continues guiding the retreat participants through a discernment exercise, asking them now to explore their spiritual gifts and what they are willing to contribute to bringing Divine Love truth into the world. He encourages them to distinguish God's Will from their own, assuring them that their individual gifts and common goals will surprise them when shared openly. | You already have the gifts; the only thing left is to decide how much of your life you are willing to give to using them. |
| [Bringing Forward the Gift of Yourselves in Service to God Will Bring Many Rewards](messages/2015/08/2015-08-16-af-augustine-3.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2015‑08‑16 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Augustine closes the day's retreat exercises by tasking each participant to bring five questions for God to the next circle, and to commit to one specific act of service. He assures them that every soul who assists another in light and love will be blessed abundantly, and that stretching beyond comfort in service opens a greater channel of Love within. | God is not asking for everything at once; He is asking for one thing, done in love, with everything you have. |
| [Augustine Asks Participants to Consider the Differences Between Our Thoughts and Soul Perceptions](messages/2015/08/2015-08-16-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2015‑08‑16 | Mind & Soul, The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Augustine invites the retreat participants to perform a discernment exercise, writing down their thoughts and guidance separately to learn to distinguish between what originates in the mind and what comes from the soul. He encourages boldness, laughter, and mutual trust, reminding them that even seemingly ordinary thoughts often contain seeds of genuine guidance. | Augustine sets a simple task: write down what feels like guidance and what feels like thinking, and be honest; you will be surprised by what you find. |
| [Amendment to Augustine's Guidance](messages/2015/08/2015-08-16-af-confucius.md) | Confucius | Al Fike | 2015‑08‑16 |  |  | Confucius gently amends Augustine's earlier instruction, noting that five questions per person would overwhelm the circle. He asks participants to discuss their questions together first, consolidate what is most important, and bring only the most essential forward, acknowledging the limitations of what may come through any instrument. | Even heaven works within limits; wisdom is knowing which question matters most and asking only that one. |
| [Let Go and Discover Your True Soul Purpose](messages/2015/08/2015-08-16-af-jesus.md) | Jesus | Al Fike | 2015‑08‑16 | Jesus Speaks, Mind & Soul | Core Teaching | Jesus speaks to the gathered retreat participants about discovering their true soul purpose, urging them to move beyond the material mind and into soul awareness through the inflowing of God's Love. He assures them that within each soul lies a clear understanding of their mission, and that the key to accessing this is not intellectual effort but the willingness to let go and receive God's Love. | Your soul already knows what you are meant to do; the only thing standing between you and that knowledge is the part of you that is afraid to find out. |

He encourages them to strengthen their bonds, lean on one another, and carry forward the fellowship and light they have found together. | The retreat is over but the fellowship is not; you leave with brothers and sisters who will walk beside you for the rest of the journey. |

He encourages complete honesty in their sharing, whether lost or knowing, and assures them that help will come. | The choice is already made within your soul; the work now is simply to uncover what is already there. |

| [Sow Seeds of Love Upon Your Journey](messages/2015/08/2015-08-17-af-confucius.md) | Confucius | Al Fike | 2015‑08‑17 | Service & Mission |  | Confucius teaches that those who carry Divine Love within their souls are already sowing seeds of hope wherever they go, often without knowing it. He encourages the gathering to open themselves to receive God's blessings through all the avenues of His creation, and to walk in the world as a beautiful gift to every soul they encounter. | You are sowing seeds of hope with every step you take; you just cannot see yet which ones will bloom. |
| [The Power of the Love Bonds Shared by Those Who Pray for God's Love Together](messages/2015/08/2015-08-17-af-isaiah.md) | Isaiah | Al Fike | 2015‑08‑17 | The Saints & Apostles Speak, Jesus Speaks |  | Isaiah and Jesus close the August 2015 Gibsons Retreat with an affirmation that those who have gathered are now bonded for eternity, their souls connected in a shared mission. They encourage the group to hold fast to their commitments, commune with God through their souls, and walk as emissaries of Divine Love in the world. | The bonds formed when souls pray together do not dissolve when the gathering ends; they are woven into eternity. |
| [Jesus Speaks Seriously of Changes to Come: Be a Channel of Love through the Storms](messages/2015/08/2015-08-17-af-jesus.md) | Jesus of Nazareth | Al Fike | 2015‑08‑17 |  | Prophecy, Core Teaching | Jesus delivers a serious and wide-ranging message to a retreat gathering, calling them to stop seeking answers through the mind and instead seek through the soul. He warns of dramatic earth changes coming soon — caused not by men but by God's Creation responding to humanity's abuse of the Earth — and urges the group to prepare themselves spiritually, establish centres of Light as refuges, and work together as committed disciples to bring the Truth of Divine Love to the world before the storms arrive. | The storms are coming, and a soul grounded in Love is the safest place to stand |
| [Drink Deep These Living Waters](messages/2015/08/2015-08-17-af-john-the-beloved.md) | John the Beloved | Al Fike | 2015‑08‑17 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | John the Beloved blesses the gathering as angels crowd around to help build the light within their midst, inviting the souls present to drink deeply of God's Living Waters and raise themselves from the human condition into the Divine Presence. | The angels have crowded close and God's Love is pouring in; all that is asked of you is to drink deeply and not pull away. |
| [Seek out Your True Purpose](messages/2015/08/2015-08-17-af-peter.md) | Peter | Al Fike | 2015‑08‑17 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Peter assures each soul present that God has embedded within them a unique purpose perfectly suited to their gifts and personality, and that ignoring it brings inner strife. He urges them to seek this purpose through prayer and soul awareness, promising that as Divine Love enlivens their souls the purpose will emerge with such clarity and power that even the mind will not contradict it. | Your true purpose is not something you choose. God placed it in your soul before you were born |
| [A Special Blessing to Those at the Gibsons Retreat](messages/2015/08/2015-08-17-af-seretta-kem.md) | Seretta Kem | Al Fike | 2015‑08‑17 |  |  | Seretta Kem delivers a healing blessing to the retreat gathering, assuring each soul that they have received a unique and permanent gift of healing tailored to their individual progression on the Divine Path, given in recognition of their effort to come together. | The effort to gather was itself an act of love, and God answered it with a healing uniquely suited to each soul present. |
| [The Road Less Traveled: Guidance for the Journey](messages/2015/08/2015-08-18-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2015‑08‑18 | Awakening Humanity, The Saints & Apostles Speak | Core Teaching | Augustine closes the retreat with a rich teaching on the spiritual path, urging the gathering to read the retreat messages again and again, plumb the depths of their souls, put God first in all things, and take responsibility for their choices. He assures them that the Light built within the soul lasts for all eternity and is worth every effort and sacrifice the path requires. | Most souls choose the road of self-empowerment; you have chosen the road that leads to God, and your shining on it gives others the same choice. |
| [We Embark on a Journey to Change the World](messages/2015/08/2015-08-19-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2015‑08‑19 | Awakening Humanity, Service & Mission, The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Augustine speaks of the great beam of Light opened to the world through the gathering's prayers, assuring them that their network of love will multiply and multiply until the power of their longing souls changes the world. He calls them to embark together on a journey to heal the world and all that within each soul that is not in harmony with God's Love. | The world is crying out and God's answer is a small group of souls praying together; do not underestimate what that can set in motion. |
| [Jesus Comes to Open and Bless a Retreat Gathering](messages/2015/08/2015-08-19-af-jesus.md) | Jesus | Al Fike | 2015‑08‑19 | Jesus Speaks |  | Jesus blesses the retreat gathering with his presence, assuring each soul that he is with them always — in their longings, their struggles, and their moments of grace. He calls them his brethren on the Path Divine and promises that together they will walk for all eternity, discovering ever more of the power and glory of God's Love. | Jesus says he called you, he is with you, and he will walk with you for all eternity; the only question is whether you will keep walking. |
| [Some Comments on What the Angels Are Doing to Facilitate Our Soul Growth](messages/2015/08/2015-08-19-af-seretta-kem.md) | Seretta Kem | Al Fike | 2015‑08‑19 | Healing Path | Spirit Biography | Seretta Kem reveals the intricate spiritual work performed by angels during prayer gatherings, including chemical transferences between souls that create deep bonds and open pathways for soul-to-soul communication. He urges the group to redouble their prayers for Divine Love as the key to unlocking the magnificent abilities that lie dormant within each soul. | While you pray, angels are performing intricate work within and between your souls that you cannot see but will one day fully understand. |
| [Andrew Encourages All to Bring the Truth of God's Love Forward](messages/2015/08/2015-08-20-af-andrew.md) | Andrew | Al Fike | 2015‑08‑20 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Andrew reflects on how God guided each soul in the gathering to His Love through unique and often unremarkable moments, and encourages them to trust that God will open doors and place on their path those who are ready to receive the Truth. He urges them to walk boldly as channels of Love, pray to be used as God's instruments, and work together in harmony, assuring them that the accumulation of humble acts of Love will build a mighty power in the world. | God guided you to this truth through an unremarkable moment. Trust Him to do the same for others |
| [Augustine Suggests That a Gift Given in Group Prayer Will Benefit Those Praying the Next Day](messages/2015/08/2015-08-20-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2015‑08‑20 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Augustine assures the gathering that they have each received a special gift from God that will work through the night to bring them to a deeper place in prayer the following day. He encourages them to go to sleep in peace and come together the next morning with great expectation of an intense and abundant inflowing of the Father's Love. | God has given you a gift tonight that will work while you sleep; come to prayer tomorrow ready to receive what He has prepared. |
| [Circles of Light: Form Them Wherever You Go](messages/2015/08/2015-08-20-af-confucius.md) | Confucius | Al Fike | 2015‑08‑20 | Service & Mission, Awakening Humanity |  | Confucius affirms the power of group prayer demonstrated at the retreat and calls the gathering to form Circles of Light wherever they go when they return home. He assures them that gathering like-minded souls in loving prayer requires no great effort — only mutual intention, love, and a desire to bring Light — and that God will grant the means and show the way. | A Circle of Light asks nothing complicated of you — just mutual love, a shared intention, and the willingness to let God do the rest. |
| [Encouragement to Establish Centers of Light](messages/2015/08/2015-08-20-af-faith-nyquist.md) | Faith Nyquist | Al Fike | 2015‑08‑20 | Service & Mission | Spirit Biography | Faith Nyquist encourages the gathering to support and pursue the creation of Centres of Light in the world, assuring them that God will provide all that is required. She speaks from her own experience of dedicating her Earth life to following God's Will, and affirms that these Centres will become refuges of peace, love, and healing for the many souls who are seeking, regardless of religious background. | Faith built her life around following God's Will without fully knowing Divine Love; she has come back to say the doors are opening and the souls are ready to flood in. |
| [Release Your Old Ways and Allow God's Love to Bring New Understanding and Love](messages/2015/08/2015-08-20-af-francis-of-assisi.md) | Francis of Assisi | Al Fike | 2015‑08‑20 | Letters from History, Awakening Humanity, The Saints & Apostles Speak | Spirit Biography | Francis of Assisi draws on his own experience of walking away from material wealth to encourage the gathering to gradually release the attachments and walls that separate them from God and one another. He assures them that as they pray for Divine Love and let go, their gifts will flourish, their lives will transform harmoniously, and they will find the freedom and fulfillment their souls have always sought. | Francis walked away from everything and gained the world; he has come back to say the same road is open to you, one step at a time. |
| [Express the Truth to Others: Padgett Talks of Why This Is So Important](messages/2015/08/2015-08-20-af-james-padgett.md) | James Padgett | Al Fike | 2015‑08‑20 |  | Historical, Spirit Biography | James Padgett speaks to the retreat gathering, reflecting on his own journey of doubt and fear as he received the Divine Love messages, and encouraging those present to walk boldly in the Truth as he could not always do himself. He assures them that the blessings of God's Love are infinite and exponential, and that even the smallest act of sharing the Truth can have great and enduring consequences for others. | The truth you carry is needed, and the world cannot hear it if you keep it to yourself |
| [Keea Instructs a Group to Go to Their Souls and Live from That Place Rather Than the Material Mind](messages/2015/08/2015-08-20-af-keea-atta-kem.md) | Keea atta Kem | Al Fike | 2015‑08‑20 |  |  | Keea atta Kem calls the gathered souls to shift their consciousness from the material mind to the sacred place of the soul, where God's Will is known, wounds are healed, and all wisdom flows. She invites them to go together into that place of deep peace and holy communion with God, where every question is answered and every fear resolved. | Your soul already knows what your mind is still arguing about |
| [Give to Others but Do Not Do so with an Empty Basket](messages/2015/08/2015-08-20-af-martin-luther.md) | Martin Luther | Al Fike | 2015‑08‑20 |  |  | Martin Luther speaks to the diverse gathering at the retreat, urging them to release all judgment of one another and to love as God loves — unconditionally. He teaches that a soul filled with God's Love gives without depletion and receives more in return, and calls each person to take up the flame of Love and carry it boldly into the world, touching even those in darkness with compassion rather than condemnation. | You cannot give what you do not have. Fill yourself with Love before you try to fill others |
| [The Change That Is Coming Will Start with the Children](messages/2015/08/2015-08-20-af-mary.md) | Mary, Mother of Jesus | Al Fike | 2015‑08‑20 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Mary reveals that the transformation of the world will begin with the children being born now, who are souls drawn to the Light and who will carry wisdom and harmony into the future. She urges those gathered to step fully into God's Love and Truth so they may teach and nurture these children, plant seeds of Love in all they encounter, and trust God to tend His garden in His own time. | The transformation of the world will begin with its youngest souls |
| [A Blessing From Jesus](messages/2015/08/2015-08-20-bd-jesus.md) | Jesus | Barbara Davies | 2015‑08‑20 | Jesus Speaks |  | Jesus blesses the retreat gathering through medium Barb Davies, affirming that each soul has received Divine Love and urging them to let it flow freely from their souls into the world. He assures them that the world is ready to receive this Love and that they are deeply needed and deeply loved. | Jesus says the world is ready; all that remains is for you to open and let the Love you carry flow freely from your soul. |

He invites those who are hiding to come out and receive God's deep and abiding Love. | Openness is not passive. It is an active choice to receive what God is already offering |
| [Return to Your Soul and Live From That Place of Stillness and Love](messages/2015/08/2015-08-21-af-keea-atta-kem.md) | Keea Atta Kem | Al Fike | 2015‑08‑21 | Mind & Soul |  | Keea Atta Kem urges the gathering to return again and again to the sacred place within the soul where God's Will is known, His voice is heard, and His Love heals all wounds. She assures them that as they do, all that holds them in the human condition will fall away, and their consciousness will shift from mind to soul, where all questions are answered and all fear is resolved. | The place where God meets you is already within you; all that is needed is to go there again and again until it becomes home. |
| [There Is No Greater Pursuit Than the Path of Divine Love](messages/2015/08/2015-08-22-af-augustine-2.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2015‑08‑22 | Two Paths, Awakening Humanity, The Saints & Apostles Speak | Core Teaching, Prophecy | Augustine delivers a wide-ranging teaching covering the soul's journey through Divine Love, the power of group prayer, and the responsibility of those who carry the key of Divine Love to share it with the world. He then turns to prophetic warnings about coming world changes driven by humanity's imbalance with creation, assuring the gathering that those who are close to God will be guided safely through what is coming and will be needed to help many others. | Augustine promises that those who carry the key of Divine Love will be needed when the world shakes; the time to become that person is now. |

He urges them to bring these inner awarenesses out into the open, examine them consciously, and work together toward the goal of integrating the changes God has brought within them. | Sharing your inner changes with others is itself an act of Love and courage |

He urges each one to start their own Circle of Light where they live — to pray, serve, and teach the Truth — and assures them that God will clear their path, lift their burdens, and provide all resources needed if they step forward in faith and love. | Every city, every town, every home can become a point of Light in the world |

He assures them that their work has sparked a reaction that will reverberate out to touch many souls, that the circle of Light they have created together will continue to be used by spirit, and that their work in the world is only just beginning. | The blessing of Jesus is not a formal ceremony. It is a living, personal touch |

He closes with a tender prayer to the Heavenly Father on behalf of all gathered, longing for at-onement, guidance, and a constant infilling of Divine Love. | Prayer is not a petition to a distant God. It is communion with One who is already present |

Jesus closes with a prayer to the Father and a vision of Circles of Light spreading across the Earth. | You are not alone. Ten celestial spirits stand with you as you go back into the world |

He teaches that souls attuned to God become channels of Divine Love and agents of change in a world in desperate need. | The soul that learns to discern God's influence from the pull of the human condition becomes steady in any storm, a channel of Love the world desperately needs. |

He teaches that the most powerful manifestation of all is the love and Light of God flowing through a soul, and that soul-to-soul connection and the words of Truth are the higher expression of God's plan. | The most powerful healing manifestation is not a miracle. It is Love |

He calls them to walk their path in humility and compassion, assuring them that God has touched and transformed them irrevocably and that their lives will increasingly reflect this great Light. | Your compassion for others is itself evidence of the Love within your soul |

He assures them that their souls are forever bonded in Love, that as one gains insight all benefit, and that a new phase of their journey has begun — one filled with rapidly opening gifts, new perceptions, and many souls awaiting their presence. | Working together in Love creates something none of you could create alone |

He acknowledges that the work will not be easy but assures them he stands with them, and calls them to be simple, generous, and loving as they walk in the Light. | You have been invited into God's plan for the world, not as a spectator but as a participant |

She notes that channels of Divine Love in the world are few and tended with great care by celestial spirits, and encourages the group to continue seeking God's Love. | Mary's love is not distant or ceremonial; it is constant, personal, and walking beside you in the very Light you seek. |

He urges daily prayer, elevated thoughts, and attentive listening in silence as the path toward maturity and deep serenity in God's Love. | Moses arrives from afar to name what prayer actually does: it opens chambers deep within the soul where God's Love brings a peace no circumstance can disturb. |

He then speaks urgently of the winds of change coming to the world, assuring the group that God will guide many souls to them and work through them as beacons of Light. He calls each one to embrace God's Will completely and walk as a Lighted Path through darkening times. | The world's need for souls in service is urgent, and you already have what it takes |
| [Like a Newborn, the Eyes of Your Soul Begin to Open Bringing Shifts and Changes of Perception](messages/2015/09/2015-09-07-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2015‑09‑07 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Augustine describes the post-retreat experience of deep inner shifting as the power of God's Love continues to transform each soul, comparing it to a newborn barely opening its eyes to a new world. He urges the group not to resist or be overwhelmed by the changes within, but to allow, accept, and trust in God as their anchor through this dramatic and rewarding process of transformation. | The disorientation you feel is not confusion. It is your soul's eyes learning to see |

He calls them to stop speculating about the future, continue in daily prayer for God's Love, and wait patiently in peace as God's plan unfolds in His good time. | Stillness is not inaction. It is the foundation from which all true action comes |

He teaches that differences between people are conditions of the material mind, while every soul equally longs for Love and is precious in God's eyes. | Confucius calls the group to see past every surface difference and recognise what is equal in all souls: the longing for Love and a place in God's Light. |

She encourages the group to walk through the world with a gracious, grateful attitude, becoming an infectious channel of Light to all they encounter. | Gratitude is not merely an attitude but a spiritual practice that clears the clouds of fear and error and lets the soul's Light into waking consciousness. |

He teaches that judgment closes the door to Love, and calls them to pray for those who cause harm, seeing every soul as precious and capable of transformation. | Andrew calls the soul strengthened by Divine Love to stop fearing the world's hostility and meet it instead with prayer, gratitude, and a blessing directed toward those who cause harm. |

He then broadens his message to all gathered, urging them to continue seeking Truth through prayer, reading inspiring passages, and walking in the flow of God's Love, assuring them that this pursuit brings all they require. | Every question your soul asks is already drawing the angels closer; keep asking and God will keep opening doors. |

She affirms that each soul carries a unique purpose and Light, and that God's Love, when allowed in deeply, will flush away whatever obscures that knowing. | Mary teaches that God has already placed unique gifts and purpose within every soul; all that is needed is the willingness to go within and let His Love reveal what is already there. |

He calls them to stop cluttering their minds with unnecessary questioning and instead allow the deep knowing of the soul to be their anchor, as God's Love gradually clears away the shadows and mists to reveal their true purpose. | The fog that obscures your soul is not permanent. She assures them that God is never disappointed in them and that as they accept who they truly are, they become a clear and beautiful channel of Love in the world. | God is never disappointed in you. Only your own expectations disappoint you |

He urges them to make the effort and take the risk of going beyond mental imaginings to that deeper place of communion with God. | The answers you are seeking from others are already within you |
