| [Trust That God's Will Is Unfolding](messages/2015/10/2015-10-02-af-andrew.md) | Andrew | Al Fike | 2015‑10‑02 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Andrew addresses a small group carrying anxiety about a difficult situation involving obstruction and opposition to God's work, urging them to release worry and trust that God's Will cannot ultimately be thwarted. He teaches that the soul already knows its purpose in service, and that harmony with God's Will is the surest path through any obstacle. | Andrew reassures those carrying heavy responsibility that the soul already knows its purpose; the task is simply to release the mind's anxiety and move forward in harmony with God's unfolding Will. |
| [Cherish This Light](messages/2015/10/2015-10-05-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2015‑10‑05 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Augustine blesses the gathered souls and urges them to take the Gift of God's Love into their lives, cherish it, protect it, and feed it through prayer so it may grow into a great flame guiding everything they do. He calls them to reach out to God in prayer and open themselves to a full and rich relationship with their Heavenly Father. | The Light within you is precious. Treat it accordingly |
| [Journey upon the Waters of Life Together](messages/2015/10/2015-10-05-af-moses.md) | Moses | Al Fike | 2015‑10‑05 |  |  | Moses, speaking from the Celestial Heavens, draws on his own life of journeying and reliance on God to encourage the gathered souls who are navigating the waters of life together. He uses the image of a boat guided by God to affirm that each soul contributes their gifts to the shared journey, and calls them to pray, have faith, and support one another as God's guiding star leads them forward. | The journey is not meant to be walked alone. God sends companions for a reason |
| [The Difference Between the Material Mind and the Soul Mind](messages/2015/10/2015-10-12-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2015‑10‑12 | Mind & Soul, Two Paths | Core Teaching | Augustine delivers a structured teaching on the two distinct forms of consciousness within every person: the material mind, developed through intellect and sensory perception, and the soul mind, which lies largely dormant until ignited by Divine Love. He explains that the natural love path perfects the spiritual mind, while the Divine Love path expands the soul mind into an ever-deepening comprehension of God's creation that continues for all eternity. | Augustine distinguishes two forms of inner knowing: the material mind's analysis and the soul mind's direct comprehension of divine reality, which opens only when God's Love ignites the flame within. |
| [Continue to Love](messages/2015/10/2015-10-12-af-john-the-beloved.md) | John the Beloved | Al Fike | 2015‑10‑12 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | John the Beloved assures the gathered souls that there is nothing to fear — God's Hand is firmly upon them and only Light and joy await. He calls them to trust in God's Will, pray for those around them who struggle, and release the need to control the paths of loved ones, accepting them with Love and prayer while walking in peace and faith. | When everything else is uncertain, continuing to love is always the right next step |
| [Mary Is with You](messages/2015/10/2015-10-12-af-mary.md) | Mary | Al Fike | 2015‑10‑12 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Mary lovingly acknowledges each person present as a channel of Divine Love and assures them that she walks with them constantly, through struggle and joy alike. She urges them to strengthen their faith by receiving God's Love and to reach out to lost souls, those seeking truth, and those in pain as they go about their daily lives. | Mary's presence is not ceremonial or occasional; she walks with each soul through difficulty and triumph alike, always nearby in prayer, in guidance, and in love. |
| [These Are the Days to Learn How to Love](messages/2015/10/2015-10-19-af-augustine-2.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2015‑10‑19 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Augustine encourages a group of souls who have prayed together over many years to trust one another, release their fears, and walk in Love. He assures them that the barriers to Love are universal and can be overcome, and that looking back they will see these as the days they truly learned to love — one another, and all their brothers and sisters in the world. | You are living in the very days that matter most, and learning to love is the work of these days |
| [Choose Well Your Next Steps](messages/2015/10/2015-10-19-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2015‑10‑19 |  |  | Augustine addresses a board meeting, urging those gathered to speak honestly from their souls rather than allowing the mind's hesitations to hold them back. He affirms that God will not override free will but that the soul will confirm the rightness of each step taken, and that every person present has a unique and necessary role in spreading the truths of God's Love. | Augustine reminds a gathering of decision-makers that God will not dictate the path, but the soul will quietly confirm the rightness of each step taken in humility and love. |
| [You Create Circles of Light in the World](messages/2015/10/2015-10-19-af-jesus.md) | Jesus | Al Fike | 2015‑10‑19 | Jesus Speaks |  | Jesus blesses the gathered group, affirming that their collective prayers and service create a Circle of Light while each individual soul radiates outward into the world. He speaks of a world crying out in pain and confusion, and of those who walk the Divine Love path as an oasis of healing and peace, together generating waves of light that will ignite the consciousness of mankind. | Jesus blesses the gathered workers, affirming that together they form a Circle of Light and individually they radiate waves of healing into a world crying out in pain and confusion. |
| [You Are Becoming God's Instruments and Channels of Love](messages/2015/10/2015-10-19-af-john-the-beloved.md) | John the Beloved | Al Fike | 2015‑10‑19 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | John the Beloved assures the gathered souls that God carries them upon the Divine Path in a mighty flow of Love, and calls them to honor every soul as God's unique creation. He affirms that they have arrived at a place of deep faith and soul Light and are now walking as God's instruments, agents of change, and channels of Love — part of a chain of Light that flows through them and touches many souls. | Becoming a channel of Love is not a destination. It is a continuous unfolding |
| [The First Father Talks about Reincarnation and the Progression of Life](messages/2015/10/2015-10-26-af-aman.md) | Aman | Al Fike | 2015‑10‑26 |  | Core Teaching, Historical | Aman, who identifies himself as the first parent of humanity, addresses a soul who believes in reincarnation. Drawing on his thousands of years of observation in spirit, he explains that the soul incarnates once in the flesh to establish its identity, then continues its journey through many planes of spirit — each offering new experiences and growth — ultimately progressing toward the Celestial Kingdom through Divine Love. He affirms that he has never witnessed a spirit returning to flesh. | You incarnate once, and that one life sets the trajectory of an eternal journey |
| [Guidance about Our Choices in the Flow of God's Love](messages/2015/10/2015-10-26-af-faith-nyquist.md) | Faith | Al Fike | 2015‑10‑26 |  |  | Faith teaches that belief is of the mind and therefore irrelevant to the deeper soul-to-soul connection that is true love in action. She calls the group to release judgment of others, to correct by example rather than instruction, and to pray confidently for those they love who struggle, trusting that God's Hand rests upon every soul being lifted in prayer. | Faith teaches that judging another's beliefs is a function of the mind; what truly changes lives is the soul-to-soul current of love flowing freely through a life lived as a quiet example of grace. |
| [So Many in the Unseen World Benefit from Your Prayers Together](messages/2015/10/2015-10-26-af-seretta-kem.md) | Seretta Kem | Al Fike | 2015‑10‑26 |  |  | Seretta Kem reveals the unseen dimensions of a Divine Love prayer circle, describing how thousands of spirits in the lower spheres gather in concentric circles around those praying, drawn by the Light and taught by celestial spirits. He encourages the group by assuring them that their prayers serve many more souls than they can see, both in the flesh and in spirit, and that the celestials are like midwives supporting the rebirthing of their souls in Love. | Your prayers reach into the spirit world and bring healing to souls you will never meet in this life |
| [Free Will Governs Your Path](messages/2015/11/2015-11-02-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2015‑11‑02 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Augustine teaches on the nature of free will, explaining that every day presents choices that lead either toward Light or toward pain. He assures the group that as their souls grow in discernment, choices become clearer and less cluttered with fear and judgment. He acknowledges the struggle of human life with compassion, affirming that the human conditions are gradually being burnt away by God's Love and that celestial spirits walk alongside them always. | Free will is not a burden. It is the dignity God gave you to choose Love |
| [Release the Yoke of Error and Lack of Self Love](messages/2015/11/2015-11-02-af-john-the-beloved.md) | John the Beloved | Al Fike | 2015‑11‑02 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | John the Beloved blesses those who continue to rise above the conditions of the world and encourages them to release the parts within themselves that are of error and pain. He describes how God's Love heals wounds, awakens the soul's faculties, and breaks the chain of error passed from generation to generation — calling each soul to shout 'I am Loved' and walk boldly toward the Light. | The yoke you are carrying was never meant for you. It can be laid down |
| [Seretta Kem Speaks to a Beginners Group](messages/2015/11/2015-11-02-af-seretta-kem.md) | Seretta Kem | Al Fike | 2015‑11‑02 |  |  | Seretta Kem welcomes a group of newer seekers, teaching that the soul's longing drew them to prayer and community long before the mind could explain why. He affirms that knowledge and truth come in time, but the soul's desire must come first, and that this longing will carry each soul forward for all eternity as God's Love ignites their gifts and draws others to them. | Seretta Kem welcomes new seekers with the assurance that their soul's longing drew them to the Light long before the mind understood why, and that same longing will carry them forward for all eternity. |
| [Persist in Your Faith in Bringing about Centers of Light in the World](messages/2015/11/2015-11-09-af-faith-nyquist.md) | Faith | Al Fike | 2015‑11‑09 |  | Spirit Biography | Faith opens with a prayer to God on behalf of the group before addressing their discouragement about the difficult work of establishing Centers of Light in the world. Drawing on her own Earth life experience of struggling to be heard while doing God's work, she calls them to persist through setbacks and narrow thinking, assuring them that spirits are actively clearing the path and that God's Will cannot ultimately be thwarted. | Faith prays for the group and then calls them to persist through every setback, assuring them that spirits are actively clearing the path and that God's Will cannot ultimately be thwarted. |
| [Healing for This Precious World Is Required](messages/2015/11/2015-11-09-af-francis-of-assisi.md) | Francis of Assisi | Al Fike | 2015‑11‑09 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Francis of Assisi opens by describing a quiet moment with the medium in the garden, then calls the gathered souls to bring healing, beauty, Love and Light to a world that struggles in darkness. He speaks of coming changes to the Earth — disruptions and adjustments necessary for the survival of all creatures — and assures those present that with the eyes and ears of their souls they will guide many through these changes as God's channels of Love. | The world is not beyond healing, but it needs souls willing to be instruments of that healing |
| [Do Not Hide Away but Express Your Gifts in the World](messages/2015/11/2015-11-16-af-alec-gaunt.md) | Alec Gaunt | Al Fike | 2015‑11‑16 |  |  | Alec Gaunt reveals he has been closely present with many in the group, working to open doors for each one and nurture their individual gifts. He calls them to set aside reluctance, shyness, and fear of judgment and step boldly into the world as God's channels of Love — expressing their unique gifts not out of pride but because hiding them inhibits their own growth and withholds blessings from many others. | Hiding your gifts is not humility. It is withholding blessings from those who need them |
| [Creating a Lattice of Light in the World](messages/2015/11/2015-11-16-af-confucius.md) | Confucius | Al Fike | 2015‑11‑16 | Awakening Humanity, Letters from History | Core Teaching | Confucius reveals that a vast network of souls is being connected through prayer, forming a lattice of Light in the world through which God's blessings flow freely. He teaches that much of this service happens on levels the soul is not yet consciously aware of, and encourages the group to include all known members of this network in their prayers as God weaves each thread into a beautiful and important tapestry. | Confucius reveals that every prayer and journey strengthens a vast lattice of Light, as God quietly weaves each soul into a tapestry of connection and blessing that spans the world. |
| [Be Joyful and Do Not Let the Worries of the World Affect You](messages/2015/11/2015-11-16-af-goldie.md) | Goldie | Al Fike | 2015‑11‑16 |  |  | Goldie brings a warm and lighthearted blessing, urging the group not to dwell in pain or circular worry but to call on her for help, promising laughter, joy, and a lighter perspective on life's concerns. She reminds them that so much of what we worry about is trivial, and that loving God with a full heart makes every burden feel lighter. | Goldie arrives as a friend rather than a teacher, promising laughter and a lighter spirit to all who call on her when the weight of worry feels too heavy to carry alone. |
| [It Shall Start in the West and Move Around the World](messages/2015/11/2015-11-23-af-jesus.md) | Jesus of Nazareth | Al Fike | 2015‑11‑23 |  | Prophecy, Core Teaching | Jesus blesses each soul who chooses the Divine Path, assuring them that God walks with them and designates an angel to each one. He reflects on his own struggles to be heard during his Earth life and affirms that God's Will is never thwarted. He declares that this message of Love will start in the West and encompass the world, calling those present to be clear, humble channels of Love — plumbing the depths of their souls rather than letting their minds prescribe what service looks like. | The awakening of humanity has already begun, and it started where you are standing |
| [Professor Salyards Affirms the Truth Spoken by King Solomon](messages/2015/11/2015-11-23-af-professor-salyards.md) | Professor Salyards | Al Fike | 2015‑11‑23 |  |  | Professor Salyards, known through the Padgett messages, follows Solomon to confirm that true wisdom and the ability to perceive spiritual truth can only come through the soul faculties opened by Divine Love. He encourages the group to redouble their prayers, promising that as these faculties open they will become credible and inspiring teachers of truth to the world. | Professor Salyards steps forward to second Solomon's testimony: the soul's vision, opened by Divine Love, sees what no intellect can reach and makes a teacher of anyone willing to pray for it. |
| [King Solomon Talks about How to Obtain True Wisdom](messages/2015/11/2015-11-23-af-solomon.md) | Solomon | Al Fike | 2015‑11‑23 | The Saints & Apostles Speak | Core Teaching | Solomon, now a Celestial Angel, reflects on the difference between the intellectual wisdom he was famous for in his Earth life and the true wisdom that comes only from a soul ignited by God's Love. He teaches that even those new to the Divine Love path have access to a deeper knowing than any purely intellectual understanding can provide. | Solomon returns not to boast of his legendary wisdom but to correct it, teaching that the deepest knowing comes not from the sharpest mind but from a soul opened by Divine Love. |
| [Guidance and Reassurance Regarding Creating Centres of Light](messages/2015/11/2015-11-25-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2015‑11‑25 | Service & Mission |  | Augustine responds to a request for guidance on establishing Centres of Light, teaching that resistance and complexity are signs to wait and pray rather than force, and that negative forces will always attempt to oppose where Light is being planted. He urges patience, love, and persistent prayer as the tools that will ultimately clear every obstacle and bring God's Will to fruition. | Augustine teaches that resistance is not a sign to abandon God's work but to pray more deeply, for no opposition can ultimately withstand love that is patient, persistent, and rooted in God's Will. |
| [Be Warriors of Light](messages/2015/11/2015-11-25-af-white-cloud.md) | White Cloud | Al Fike | 2015‑11‑25 |  |  | White Cloud honours the many souls drawn to a long-established Circle of Light and calls those present to be warriors of Light in the world, expressing God's Love through every avenue and gift available to them. He teaches that words alone do not move souls — only Love permeating every action can stop the tide of darkness and bring healing and truth to a yearning humanity. | White Cloud calls the gathered souls to be warriors of Light — not through words or argument but through a life so saturated with God's Love that it shifts souls simply by its presence. |
| [You Cannot See the Events Coming but Have Faith That God Will Use You](messages/2015/11/2015-11-26-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2015‑11‑26 |  |  | Augustine explains why celestial spirits do not reveal the full scope of what lies ahead, teaching that foreknowledge would distort rather than assist the free flow of human choices in harmony with God's Plan. He calls the group to stay grounded in daily prayer, love, and patience, trusting that God carries them and will reveal what is needed at the right moment. | Augustine explains that God and the angels withhold foreknowledge not out of secrecy but out of love, knowing that too much information would distort the very choices that must be freely made. |
| [On Being a Channel of God's Love: What It Is and What It Is Not](messages/2015/11/2015-11-26-af-simon.md) | Simon | Al Fike | 2015‑11‑26 | Service & Mission | Core Teaching | Simon delivers a clear teaching on what it truly means to be a channel of God's Love, distinguishing soul development and rapport with God from ego-driven assumptions about vocation, titles, and plans. He teaches that the most effective channel is one who is simply present with God, unencumbered by the mind's need to direct or claim ownership of what Love accomplishes. | Simon strips away every assumption about what makes a channel of love, leaving only this: a soul close to God, unencumbered by the mind's need to plan or claim what Love is doing. |
| [Walk in the World as Loving Channels to One Another](messages/2015/11/2015-11-28-af-alec-gaunt.md) | Alec Gaunt | Al Fike | 2015‑11‑28 |  |  | Alec Gaunt adds his encouragement to the group, affirming that surprising turns of events await those who continue riding the wave of God's Love and pursuing His work in the world. He holds up a vision of what the world would be if all people could trust, give, and share with one another in love, and calls each soul to walk in the world as a loving channel acknowledging the beauty and uniqueness of every person they meet. | Alec Gaunt offers a simple vision of what the world is meant to become: every soul acknowledging every other in their beauty and uniqueness, walking together as channels of love. |
| [Prayer to Bring Freedom and Joy](messages/2015/11/2015-11-28-af-confucius.md) | Confucius | Al Fike | 2015‑11‑28 |  |  | Confucius offers a beautiful prayer to the Heavenly Father on behalf of those gathered, asking that their burdens be lifted, that they be freed from the shackles of earthly conditions, and that they be uplifted into glorious Light and the joy of God's presence within. | Prayer is not an obligation. It is the most direct path to freedom and joy |
| [The Power of Prayer to Bring Change and Healing](messages/2015/11/2015-11-28-af-faith-nyquist.md) | Faith | Al Fike | 2015‑11‑28 |  |  | Faith marvels at the power generated by a large gathering of souls praying together, teaching that sincere prayer and soul-longing for God's Love brings real change both in the world and the spirit realm. She assures the group that no hurt, pain, or dilemma is insurmountable through this Love, and calls them to the simplicity of prayer as the one act that opens everything. | Faith strips prayer back to its essence: no complex explanations, no analysis, just the simple act of longing for God, which opens a vast ocean of Love available to every soul without exception. |
| [God's Grace Is Here](messages/2015/11/2015-11-28-af-jesus.md) | Jesus | Al Fike | 2015‑11‑28 | Jesus Speaks |  | Jesus welcomes a gathered group into the Circle of Light, blessing them with the assurance of God's immediate presence and love. | [Free Will versus God's Will](messages/2015/12/2015-12-14-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2015‑12‑14 | Mind & Soul, The Saints & Apostles Speak | Core Teaching | Augustine teaches that the human mind alone cannot know God's Will, and that only a soul enlivened by Divine Love can perceive and align with it. He calls the circle to release mind-driven willfulness, seek the deeper consciousness of the soul, and become beacons of God's reality as the world stands on the verge of great change. | You cannot know God's Will from your mind. You can only know it from your soul |

| [Awakening of the Soul Mind](messages/2015/12/2015-12-27-af-confucius.md) | Confucius | Al Fike | 2015‑12‑27 | Letters from History, Mind & Soul |  | Confucius announces that something new is dawning for the group — a place of inner knowing where the mind no longer doubts but opens to God's guidance and the soul takes ascendency. He calls them to accept the coming changes with joy, assuring them that this awakening will bring serene strength, effortless service, and the full blossoming of what has long been budding within. | Confucius sees the flower that has long been budding finally beginning to bloom, and calls each soul to step joyously into the awakening already underway. |
| [The Time Comes for You to Express These Gifts](messages/2015/12/2015-12-28-af-keea-atta-kem.md) | Keea Atta Kem | Al Fike | 2015‑12‑28 | Prism of the Soul |  | Keea Atta Kem tells the group that the time has come to stop standing at the threshold and step fully into the flow of God's Love. She calls them to release judgment and division between themselves, to walk together in unity, and to open the mighty river of soul gifts within them to a world starving for spiritual nourishment. | Keea Atta Kem sees a mighty river dammed by judgment and division, and calls the group to let it go so the Love already within them can finally flood the world. |
| [Look Forward to New Opportunities in the Coming Year](messages/2015/12/2015-12-30-af-alec-gaunt.md) | Alec Gaunt | Al Fike | 2015‑12‑30 |  |  | Alec Gaunt looks ahead to the new year, encouraging the group that surprising doors will open and challenges will arise, but that both are gifts for soul growth. He teaches that God does not send adversity but that the conditions of the world bring inevitable challenges through which the soul learns, and that the year ahead holds deep communion with God, greater clarity of purpose, and a fuller revelation of each soul's true self. | Alec Gaunt looks into the coming year with clear eyes: surprising doors, real challenges, and deeper communion with God than ever before. |
| [Accepting the New Awarenesses of an Opening Soul](messages/2016/01/2016-01-04-af-confucius.md) | Confucius | Al Fike | 2016‑01‑04 | Mind & Soul | Core Teaching | Confucius teaches that the great challenge of the spiritual life is allowing the soul to come into direct communication with the mind, dissolving the filters and prejudices that obstruct true perception. He assures the circle that as this merging of awarenesses deepens through God's Love, they will see both the beauty of God's Creation and the darkness of man's, yet remain anchored and unswayed by the power of Divine Love within them. | There may be nothing between your mind and your soul - a merging of consciousness |
| [You Struggle But You Make Progress](messages/2016/02/2016-02-29-af-confucius.md) | Confucius | Al Fike | 2016‑02‑29 |  |  | Confucius tenderly acknowledges the struggles of the circle as their souls undergo a deep cleansing, assuring them that God is never far and that releasing their burdens through faith opens the way to healing, joy, and becoming a powerful channel of Love in the world. | The struggle is not a sign that something is wrong. It is proof that something is growing |
| [Talk on Service to God](messages/2016/03/2016-03-18-af-john-the-beloved.md) | John the Beloved | Al Fike | 2016‑03‑18 | Service & Mission, The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | John the Beloved encourages the circle never to doubt their service to God, teaching that every soul aligned with God's Will serves Him in many ways — seen and unseen — and that as the soul deepens in Divine Love, service becomes clearer, more powerful, and more joyfully aligned with God's unfolding plan. | You and God are bonded for all eternity and you shall continue to serve Him in ever greater ways |
| [The Awakening of Humanity](messages/2016/03/2016-03-21-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2016‑03‑21 | The Saints & Apostles Speak | Prophecy | Augustine declares that humanity is in a deep spiritual slumber, and that those gathered are the first tender shoots of a great awakening dawning for mankind — called to drink deep of God's Love, release all barriers, and emerge into the Light of their unique purpose and service. | You are the first tender shoots of a spring that is dawning for all of mankind |
| [Talk on Service](messages/2016/03/2016-03-26-af-andrew.md) | Andrew | Al Fike | 2016‑03‑26 | Service & Mission, The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Andrew celebrates the many forms of service already expressed by those gathered — healing, teaching, raising children, loving others — and urges them to continue opening their souls to Divine Love, the very spark of their desire to serve, trusting that God will guide each one along their unique path of expression. | There is a deep recognition within you that you are meant to love and to be a channel of Love |
| [The Gift of Life](messages/2016/03/2016-03-29-af-james.md) | James | Al Fike | 2016‑03‑29 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | James reflects on the gift and purpose of incarnation — the soul's entry into flesh to acquire identity, express its unique gifts, and grow in love — and offers comfort to the circle in a time of bereavement, assuring them that God's hand rests upon all who grieve and that peace will come. | To know your soul and to know who you truly are is the greatest of all gifts to yourself |
| [A Lesson on the Power of Humility](messages/2016/03/2016-03-30-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2016‑03‑30 | Letters from History, The Saints & Apostles Speak | Core Teaching, Spirit Biography | Augustine delivers a deeply personal teaching on humility, confessing openly that in his Earth life he was a man of ambition, desire for power, and fleshly pleasures who taught error that still persists in the church today. From this confession he draws a powerful teaching: true humility is not weakness but the greatest strength, allowing God's Love to flow through you unrestricted, unfiltered, and uncontaminated by self-will. | True power is not control. It is the strength that comes from letting God flow through you unrestricted |
| [In Knowing and Growing Your Soul, You Will Find Your True Self](messages/2016/04/2016-04-04-af-jesus.md) | Jesus of Nazareth | Al Fike | 2016‑04‑04 | Jesus Speaks | Core Teaching | Jesus calls those gathered to move beyond mental constructs of service and surrender to the higher road of listening for and obeying God's Will, promising that in doing so they will discover their true soul's purpose, experience profound joy and fulfillment, and become a genuine gift to the world. | You are a gift to the world. As you truly love yourselves, oh what wonders your Heavenly Father may manifest through you |
| [The Prism of Our Souls](messages/2016/04/2016-04-04-af-keea-atta-kem.md) | Keea atta Kem | Al Fike | 2016‑04‑04 | Prism of the Soul | Core Teaching | Keea atta Kem teaches that Divine Love acts as a prism through which the light of the soul is refracted into many unique gifts and colors, and that each soul possesses a distinct combination of these gifts — healing, perception, empathy, wisdom, communication — which God enlivens and orchestrates in beautiful and wondrous ways. | The light within your soul refracts through the prism of God's Love, each colour a unique gift |
| [Talk on Compassion and Service](messages/2016/04/2016-04-05-af-gandhi.md) | Mahatma Gandhi | Al Fike | 2016‑04‑05 | Awakening Humanity, Letters from History | Historical, Spirit Biography | Mahatma Gandhi draws on the lessons of his own Earth life to encourage the circle to pursue their mission of spiritual awakening with clarity, dedication, compassion, and inspiration from God, promising that those who fight to push back darkness and bring spiritual change to the world will receive special dispensations of strength and power from God. | Everyone hungers for love. Prepare a feast for the starving soul |
| [Expectations of the Mind: On Releasing Control](messages/2016/04/2016-04-12-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2016‑04‑12 | Mind & Soul, The Saints & Apostles Speak | Core Teaching | Augustine calls his students to release the mind's need to control outcomes and impose its will upon the world and those around them, teaching that true humility is this act of letting go, and that in doing so God's Will can infuse every part of their lives, marking the beginning of their ministry in the world. | Think how much freedom you will obtain by simply letting go |
| [Lesson on the Falsity of the Vicarious Atonement and the Unsure Nature of Written Truth](messages/2016/04/2016-04-12-af-moses.md) | Moses | Al Fike | 2016‑04‑12 | Letters from History, Two Paths | Core Teaching, Historical | Moses repudiates the doctrine of the Vicarious Atonement, tracing its roots to the blood sacrifice tradition of ancient Judaism, and teaches that no written word — not even the Bible — constitutes absolute Truth; rather, Truth is received personally through the soul's connection with God and expressed through the channel of Divine Love, not through argument or correction of others. | The word is not sacred. What is sacred is your living connection with your Heavenly Father |
| [The Greatest Healing Energy of All Is God's Divine Love](messages/2016/04/2016-04-13-af-seretta-kem.md) | Seretta Kem | Al Fike | 2016‑04‑13 | Healing Path | Core Teaching | Seretta Kem acknowledges the many healing energies and practices present in the circle, but teaches that Divine Love — God's Essence poured into the soul through longing and prayer — is the one gift that cannot be passed from person to person, must come directly from God, and surpasses all other healing energies in power, permanence, and transformative effect. | There is only one blessing that cannot be given from one person to another. It must come directly from God |
| [Each Day Has the Potential to Bring Light Given the Right Intentions](messages/2016/04/2016-04-14-af-john-the-beloved.md) | John the Beloved | Al Fike | 2016‑04‑14 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | John the Beloved teaches on the power of intention, showing how a soul's sincere desire to seek the highest, serve others, embrace all they meet, and push back the darkness creates real and lasting change in the world — magnified over and over as Divine Love deepens within. | Like the butterfly that flutters its wings and creates the hurricane, these tiny flutters of Light will create change |
| [Nurture Those You Encounter](messages/2016/04/2016-04-14-af-mary.md) | Mary, Mother of Jesus | Al Fike | 2016‑04‑14 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Mary affirms the nurturing hearts of those gathered and encourages them to continue embracing every soul they meet with love and compassion, teaching that even a simple touch of love plants within that soul a desire for God's Love and can ignite great spiritual change. | God places within the souls of those you touch a desire for His Love, and this is powerful |
| [You Will Come Together Again](messages/2016/04/2016-04-19-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2016‑04‑19 | Service & Mission, The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Augustine closes a season of intense teaching and fellowship by affirming how much has been accomplished, promising the group will be summoned together again, and urging them to carry the treasure of Truth they have received — sharing it in love, humility, and joy. | Hidden within each lesson is a great door to growing your souls |
| [The Law of Change](messages/2016/04/2016-04-27-af-alec-gaunt.md) | Alec Gaunt | Al Fike | 2016‑04‑27 |  |  | Alec Gaunt teaches that change is a fundamental law of the universe, and that the key to navigating it is not resistance but a willing, faith-filled acceptance of God's hand in all transitions — for when God's Love is within you, even the most unexpected changes become joyous doorways to greater Light and growth. | Change itself is the path, not an obstacle to it |
| [Two Paths Towards Love and Purification](messages/2016/05/2016-05-02-af-andrew.md) | Andrew | Al Fike | 2016‑05‑02 | Two Paths, The Saints & Apostles Speak | Core Teaching | Andrew teaches that every soul faces two paths of purification: the natural love path, which requires full conscious recompense for every memory and injury carried in the soul through the spirit spheres, and the Divine Love path, which transforms and releases these conditions exponentially through God's healing fire — a swifter, higher road to the Celestial Heavens and unlimited soul growth. | You are already building your eternal home with every prayer you say today |
| [Walk with Me in This Light](messages/2016/05/2016-05-11-af-jesus.md) | Jesus of Nazareth | Al Fike | 2016‑05‑11 | Two Paths, Jesus Speaks |  | Jesus comes to be with those gathered in prayer, calling them to immerse themselves in the river of God's Love, offering the prayer for Divine Love in his own words, and inviting each soul to walk with him on the path that leads to at-onement, truth, and holy communion with God. | The prayer itself, offered by Jesus as a living invitation |
| [Aman Speaks of the Original State of Humanity and the Fall from Grace](messages/2016/05/2016-05-29-af-aman.md) | Aman | Al Fike | 2016‑05‑29 | Two Paths, Letters from History | Core Teaching, Spirit Biography, Historical | Aman, the first parent of humanity, gives a first-person account of the original paradisical state of mankind, the fateful moment when suspicion of God's offer of Divine Love became the first sin, the swift fall from grace that followed, and his deep regret — and wisdom — about a choice that set the course of all human history. | The choice refused at the beginning of time is being offered again, and this time we can choose differently |
| [Breaking Free of the Shell Around Your Soul](messages/2016/06/2016-06-13-af-james.md) | James | Al Fike | 2016‑06‑13 | Mind & Soul, The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | James reassures those anxious about their spiritual progress that despite their mental struggles and self-judgment, they are already channels of Love in the world — and that the restlessness and fragility they feel is the shell of encrustation cracking as their true souls emerge, like a chick breaking free from the egg, with God and His angels as midwives. | You are already in the process of being reborn. The struggle you feel is the shell cracking, not failure |
| [You Will Fulfill Your Mandate to Be a Channel of Love at My Home](messages/2016/06/2016-06-27-af-brother-mandus.md) | Brother Mandus | Al Fike | 2016‑06‑27 | Letters from History | Spirit Biography, Historical | Brother Mandus, founder of the World Healing Crusade in Blackpool, England, speaks to members of the circle who have been serving at his organisation, assuring them that despite opposition and mental obstacles, God's Will to use them as channels of Divine Love at his house will manifest — and that what is needed is not a strong personality but a humble, prayerful, soul-centred servant of God's Will. | What is needed is not a strong personality but a humble, prayerful soul |
| [Love Is the True Currency of Life](messages/2016/07/2016-07-04-af-francis-of-assisi.md) | Francis of Assisi | Al Fike | 2016‑07‑04 | Letters from History, The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Francis of Assisi speaks of love as the great unifying force of the universe and the true currency of life, sharing how he found God's Love alone in the forest among creatures, and urging all who seek spiritually to beseech God for this Love — whether through the natural or Divine Love path — for it will transform the soul, awaken its gifts, and lead to at-onement with God. | Love is not something to find outside yourself. It is something God pours in when you simply ask |
| [The Awakened Soul](messages/2016/07/2016-07-09-af-confucius.md) | Confucius | Al Fike | 2016‑07‑09 | Mind & Soul |  | Confucius welcomes a circle of souls seeking Truth and gently directs them inward — to plumb the depths of their own souls — teaching that it is God's Love that ignites a soul to awaken, and that the awakened soul has a capacity to understand Truth that the mind alone simply cannot access. | The awakened soul understands Truth in ways the mind simply cannot |
| [Nurturing the Mind or the Soul: It's a Choice](messages/2016/07/2016-07-10-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2016‑07‑10 | Mind & Soul, The Saints & Apostles Speak | Core Teaching | Augustine delivers a comprehensive teaching on the soul's yearning as the true key to God, contrasting the mind's compulsion to rationalize and control with the soul's deeper capacity to receive Divine Truth. He traces the roots of human error to the mind's domination over the soul, charts both the natural love and Divine Love paths to their ultimate destinations, and urges each soul to plumb its own depths and follow the yearning that leads to at-onement with God. | The yearning itself is the prayer, and the crack in the armor of the mind is where God enters |
| [You Will All Be Instrumental on the Path](messages/2016/08/2016-08-15-af-mary.md) | Mary, Mother of Jesus | Al Fike | 2016‑08‑15 | Awakening Humanity, The Saints & Apostles Speak | Prophecy | Mary celebrates the joyful gathering of souls and assures them that not only do their Circles of Light bless many in this world and the spirit world, but that they stand on the threshold of a great work beginning — when each soul's true purpose will manifest in a mighty wave, opening doors of service and instrumentality in God's plan for the healing and salvation of mankind. | You are standing on the threshold of a great work already begun |
| [Express the Potentials of Your Awakening Souls](messages/2016/08/2016-08-16-af-james.md) | James | Al Fike | 2016‑08‑16 | Mind & Soul, The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | James acknowledges the noise and distraction of the material world and encourages the circle to remain in the flow of God's Love throughout each day, assuring them that as they do, the great treasure of gifts within their awakening souls will rise into expression — and they will come to know God's Will, walk in Light, and touch many souls as testimony to His Love. | The treasure house of your soul's gifts is already there, waiting to be discovered |
| [The Minds of Men Hunger for the Reality that Words Create but the Soul Hungers for Love](messages/2016/08/2016-08-17-af-james-padgett.md) | James Padgett | Al Fike | 2016‑08‑17 | Service & Mission, Letters from History | Core Teaching, Spirit Biography | James Padgett reflects openly on his own fear and desire for recognition when the truth of Divine Love first came to him, and uses it to teach that effective ministry requires not perfect knowledge or a polished presentation, but a humble, loving sharing of one's own unique experience of God — for it is the embrace, not the argument, that touches another soul. | Your unique story of Love is all you need, and your embrace will touch souls your words alone never could |
| [The World Needs Your Prayers](messages/2016/12/2016-12-02-af-white-cloud.md) | White Cloud | Al Fike | 2016‑12‑02 | Awakening Humanity |  | White Cloud responds to the circle's prayers for a struggling world, affirming that those who speak truth do so because they know it in their hearts, and urging all who carry the truth of God's Love to pray for the world — its lost souls, its children, its hungry — and to express that Love gently, daily, and with dignity, for love is the only true agent of healing and change. | Love is not the soft option. It is the most powerful force in the universe |
| [Talk on Mediumship: The Laws of Communication and Rapport](messages/2016/12/2016-12-06-af-seretta-kem.md) | Seretta Kem | Al Fike | 2016‑12‑06 | Healing Path | Core Teaching | Seretta Kem delivers a comprehensive teaching on the gift of mediumship — how spirit communication works, the conditions required for it, the dangers of expectation and premature gift-opening, and the crucial discernment principle that any message not centred on God's Love and the flowering of the soul is not from a Celestial angel. He concludes that while mediumship is a blessing, the gift of Divine Love received in prayer is infinitely greater. | The gift of Divine Love received wordlessly in prayer is greater than any message from a spirit |
| [Be Calm in the Coming Storms](messages/2016/12/2016-12-07-af-andrew.md) | Andrew | Al Fike | 2016‑12‑07 | Awakening Humanity, The Saints & Apostles Speak | Prophecy | Andrew speaks prophetically of coming changes in both the world and within each soul, urging those gathered to accept the flow of God's Love and allow it to fully transform them — for in the coming storms they will be the calm, steady souls others look to for comfort, truth, and guidance. | In any storm, the soul that is calm is the one others turn to |
| [Time to Accept a New Way of Being](messages/2016/12/2016-12-29-af-matthew.md) | Matthew | Al Fike | 2016‑12‑29 | Mind & Soul, The Saints & Apostles Speak | Prophecy | Matthew speaks prophetically of changes coming in the new year for the circle and the world, urging them to release the illusions and mental constructs built up over a lifetime and accept the new reality of soul-centred truth — for they are being prepared to lead others through the same transformative process in the times ahead. | The reality you have built in your mind is not the only reality. Letting go of it is liberation, not loss |

The only obstructions are the ones you create yourself |
| [Accept Every Unique Soul: Their Differences Will Not Harm You Spiritually](messages/2017/01/2017-01-16-af-keea-atta-kem.md) | Keea Atta Kem | Al Fike | 2017‑01‑16 | Prism of the Soul |  | Keea atta Kem addresses the anxiety of spiritually sensitive souls who feel affected by the world's conditions, teaching that increased sensitivity is a natural sign of soul growth, that thoughts attract like energies by law, and that the Love within a growing soul provides powerful protection — so there is no need for fear, only joyful acceptance of each unique soul walking their own path toward God. | Sensitivity is a sign of growth, not vulnerability, and the Love within you is stronger than anything you encounter outside |
| [Changes Within Your Soul Will Bring Many Rewards](messages/2017/01/2017-01-23-af-alec-gaunt.md) | Alec Gaunt | Al Fike | 2017‑01‑23 | Mind & Soul, Healing Path |  | Alec Gaunt addresses souls in the midst of deep inner transformation, teaching that the discomfort, confusion, and self-criticism they feel is the natural result of old patterns and conditions being burned away by God's Love. He urges them to recognize that the outward conscious self they cling to is not their true self, and that as the fire of Divine Love burns brighter within, the treasures of their true souls will emerge in beauty and power. | The outward self you cling to is a paper tiger. Your true self, with all its gifts and treasures, is waiting inside your soul |
| [Building a Foundation of Spiritual Growth and Development](messages/2017/01/2017-01-25-af-alec-gaunt.md) | Alec Gaunt | Al Fike | 2017‑01‑25 |  |  | Alec Gaunt returns to a church he has visited many times both in the flesh and in spirit, urging those gathered to open themselves to the living waters of God's Love and build within themselves the great foundation of a relationship with their Heavenly Father - one that will carry them through every challenge, every joy, and every aspect of their lives. | The greatest fulfillment your soul can experience is simply to be with God |
| [Release Self-Will and Embrace the Perfect Will of God](messages/2017/03/2017-03-27-af-james.md) | James | Al Fike | 2017‑03‑27 | Mind & Soul, The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | James speaks with compassion to souls caught between the world of man and the world of God, teaching that the struggle to release self-will and surrender to God's Will is the central challenge of the Divine Path - and that while the mind clings stubbornly to the old ways, the soul has already chosen, and progress is inevitable for those who continue to pray and turn their face to God. | You already know which way you will choose. Your soul drew you here |
| [Faculties of the Soul Compared to a Camera Lens](messages/2017/04/2017-04-10-af-james.md) | James | Al Fike | 2017‑04‑10 | Mind & Soul, The Saints & Apostles Speak | Core Teaching | James clarifies how God's Will flows through a soul by using the metaphor of a camera: the image of Truth is placed directly within the soul by God's Love, the iris represents the soul's will and desire which regulates how much flows through, and the lens is the mind which either focuses or distorts what comes forth. When all three are in alignment, the result is a clear and undoubted expression of God's Will in the world. | The image of God's Truth is already within you. The only question is whether the iris is open and the lens is clear |
| [Jesus Speaks of the Pentecost](messages/2017/05/2017-05-11-af-jesus.md) | Jesus of Nazareth | Al Fike | 2017‑05‑11 | Awakening Humanity, Jesus Speaks, Letters from History | Core Teaching | Jesus explains the historical conditions that allowed his disciples to receive the Pentecost, then holds up an honest mirror to those gathered, asking whether their longing is truly deep enough to receive it. He teaches that soul awakening may come gradually or in a great rush, that God always desires to give this gift, and that the only thing preventing the Pentecost is the soul's own unreadiness to receive it fully. | The only thing holding you back from the awakening of your soul is you |
| [Accept the Diversity that God Created](messages/2017/05/2017-05-13-af-yogananda.md) | Yogananda | Al Fike | 2017‑05‑13 | Letters from History | Core Teaching, Spirit Biography, Historical | Yogananda speaks from his own sanctuary in Encinitas, confirming he inhabits the Celestial Kingdom and that his teachings, though expressed in his own tradition, were always rooted in the same Truth of God's Love. He calls those gathered to accept the diversity of God's creation, embrace all souls regardless of background or belief, and understand that each unique voice adds to the full and beautiful truth of God's Love in the world. | When different souls bring their truth together, they create something more beautiful than any one of them could alone |
| [Allow God to Use You as His Channel of Love](messages/2017/05/2017-05-22-af-andrew.md) | Andrew | Al Fike | 2017‑05‑22 | Service & Mission, The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Andrew affirms two instruments who have been travelling and serving, reminding them that God uses willing souls in ways they often cannot see or measure - through a smile, a comment, an intention - and calls all who are willing to walk openly in faith each day, trusting that God will guide every step as part of His great plan for the salvation of mankind. | When your days are over and you look back, you will see that every step led to the next, and your life was an expression of Light |
| [Lesson on Judgement](messages/2017/06/2017-06-15-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2017‑06‑15 | Mind & Soul, The Saints & Apostles Speak | Core Teaching | Augustine delivers a comprehensive lesson on the urge to judge, teaching that our reactions to others' conditions reveal our own soul state, that judgment is incompatible with Love, and that the antidote is not suppression but conscious choice - catching yourself in the act of judgment and choosing Love instead. He includes an extended first-person inner monologue as a template for how to make that choice in the moment. | With Love, I cannot judge. With joy, I cannot judge. With acceptance, I cannot judge |
| [Only the Soul Can Know God's Love](messages/2017/08/2017-08-21-af-matthew.md) | Matthew | Al Fike | 2017‑08‑21 | The Saints & Apostles Speak | Core Teaching | Matthew teaches that the soul's experience of God's Love cannot be described intellectually, only felt - and that each soul's experience of this Touch is unique. He warns against turning personal spiritual experience into a dogmatic formula, urging all to validate and accept the wide range of ways that God's Love manifests within different souls. | A thousand words and a million books will never bring this Truth as it is experienced by that deep Touch from God |
| [Release of Limitations](messages/2017/09/2017-09-12-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2017‑09‑12 | Mind & Soul, The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Augustine acknowledges the real limitations of living in a material body and mind shaped by early conditioning, and teaches that God's Love, incrementally building within the soul, has the power to purify these conditions from the inside outward - bringing not a loss of self but a simplification and clarification of consciousness, where soul wisdom replaces mental complexity and self-judgment gives way to deep self-love. | There is so much to learn, and yet there is so much to unlearn |
| [The Time Approaches](messages/2017/09/2017-09-12-af-confucius.md) | Confucius | Al Fike | 2017‑09‑12 | Awakening Humanity | Prophecy | Confucius, speaking on behalf of many angels who wish to address the circle, announces that the time is approaching when years of prayer and soul longing will open many doors of opportunity to bring Light, Truth, Peace, and Love to a world in desperate need - with the entire Celestial Kingdom watching and ready to guide and support each willing instrument. | All those years of prayer are about to open doors you have not yet imagined |
| [Understanding the Laws of Love and the Regeneration of Our Souls](messages/2017/09/2017-09-12-af-martin-luther.md) | Martin Luther | Al Fike | 2017‑09‑12 | Mind & Soul, Two Paths | Core Teaching | Martin Luther responds to the group's conversation about limitations, teaching that God has created an ordered universe governed by laws, that the Law of Divine Love supersedes all others and can bypass the long process of natural love purification, and that each soul bears personal responsibility for their own regeneration - for God cannot spoon-feed a soul into harmony without that soul's own desire, effort, and prayer. | To one whose soul is filled with Love, obeying God's Laws is not a burden. It makes perfect sense |
| [Make Love Your Guiding Truth Through Earth Changes](messages/2017/09/2017-09-13-af-keea-atta-kem.md) | Keea Atta Kem | Al Fike | 2017‑09‑13 | Awakening Humanity | Core Teaching, Prophecy | Keea atta Kem delivers a wide-ranging prophetic teaching on the intensifying changes coming to the world - magnetic pole shifts, disrupted animal behaviour, dramatic environmental and social upheaval - teaching that these are the consequences of humanity's disregard for God's Laws of Creation, and that those who carry Divine Love will be guided to scientists, leaders, and seekers as rocks of stability and truth in the coming storms. | You will be a rock in a world disrupted by change, and the chaos around you will be the very thing that sends people to your door |
| [Choice and Accepting the Will of God](messages/2017/10/2017-10-25-af-yogananda.md) | Yogananda | Al Fike | 2017‑10‑25 | Service & Mission, Letters from History | Spirit Biography | Yogananda addresses the group's deliberations about a journey to India, using his own experience of leaving India for America as a teaching on faith, service, and accepting God's invitations. He teaches that God never demands or punishes, but lays opportunities before each soul — and that a soul filled with Love, faith, and trust is the one most able to step forward into the unknown and discover what God has prepared. | God will never turn away from you no matter what you decide. But if every invitation is rejected, the invitations will cease |
| [Tesla Talks About the Power of Love](messages/2017/11/2017-11-03-af-nikola-tesla.md) | Nikola Tesla | Al Fike | 2017‑11‑03 | Letters from History | Spirit Biography, Historical | Nikola Tesla speaks from spirit about his continued exploration of the universe's mechanics and his particular interest in assisting the development of Direct Voice mediumship, which he understands to have an electrical component. He teaches that Divine Love is the most powerful energy in the universe, that its capacities far exceed what humanity has understood, and that as souls mature in Love, scientific understanding will flourish in ways that will astound the world. | Love is not just a feeling. It is the most powerful energy in the universe, and its capacities have barely been understood |
| [On Soul Expiation](messages/2017/12/2017-12-12-af-seretta-kem.md) | Seretta Kem | Al Fike | 2017‑12‑12 | Healing Path | Core Teaching | Seretta Kem delivers a detailed teaching on the mechanics of soul expiation, explaining how encrustations around the soul block the inflowing of Divine Love, the two major factors that prevent people from feeling God's Love in prayer, and the many routes by which God finds His way through even the most armoured soul. He also teaches that it is not the responsibility of God's channels to insist on any particular route for another soul, but simply to give the simple Truth of God's Love in love and respect. | There is always a crack in the armor. God always finds a way through |
| [A Blessing](messages/2017/12/2017-12-14-af-jesus.md) | Jesus of Nazareth | Al Fike | 2017‑12‑14 | Jesus Speaks |  | Jesus blesses those gathered, affirming that they are no longer lost and carry the Truth within their souls, and calling them to step forward and claim their purpose as God's bringers of Truth in the world - promising that great gifts, power, and Love will be poured upon all who walk in this Light. | You are no longer lost. Now it is time to carry this Truth to the world |
| [The Responsibility of Acting in Love Lies with You](messages/2017/12/2017-12-18-af-martin-luther.md) | Martin Luther | Al Fike | 2017‑12‑18 | Mind & Soul |  | Martin Luther addresses souls returning to the world after a period of spiritual immersion, teaching that this is now the critical phase of application - where the new sensibilities and soul awareness gained must be consciously chosen over old mind patterns in the real world. He calls them to take responsibility for their own thoughts and choices, reminding them that God and the angels are always available to help when asked. | You are babies no longer. The phase of application has begun |
| [Teach Each Soul to Go to God in Prayer](messages/2018/01/2018-01-01-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2018‑01‑01 | Service & Mission, The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Augustine opens 2018 by announcing a new phase of service for those gathered, promising that God's Will will be laid plainly before them as their souls awaken further. He cautions against becoming a source of dependence for those drawn to their Light, and teaches that the true mission is to humbly point each soul to God as the Source of all gifts, teaching every soul to go directly to God in prayer for themselves. | Resist the temptation of adulation. Humbly point every soul to God as the Source of all gifts |
| [Many Gifts for the Circle of Seven](messages/2018/01/2018-01-09-af-lotus-blossom.md) | Lotus Blossom | Al Fike | 2018‑01‑09 |  | Prophecy | Lotus Blossom addresses a circle of seven beloved souls, promising that gifts of spiritual perception are coming to each one in unique ways. sight of auras, perception of spirits, inner hearing, and deep intuitive knowing. She urges them to allow these gifts to unfold naturally without forcing or formulating them through the mind, to support one another, and to trust that each moment lived in harmony with God is already an expression of His Will. | Like a flower emerging from the ground, your gifts are budding. They will come, and they will come quickly |
| [Who Will Bring the Truth to This World?](messages/2018/01/2018-01-21-af-professor-salyards.md) | Professor Salyards | Al Fike | 2018‑01‑21 |  | Prophecy, Historical | Professor Salyards, a tireless worker in the development of Direct Voice mediumship, affirms the circle's progress and urges them to maintain their hopeful expectation of this gift. He speaks with urgency about humanity's need to awaken before the consequences of the human condition become irreversible, and assures them that even if Direct Voice is not achieved, they will bring Truth through other gifts - but that this gift is very much worth pursuing. | How will the world change if not by this awakening of the soul, the faculties of the soul, the connection of the soul to God? |
| [New Thresholds, New Life](messages/2018/01/2018-01-24-af-alec-gaunt.md) | Alec Gaunt | Al Fike | 2018‑01‑24 |  |  | Alec Gaunt speaks to a group all standing on the threshold of change, assuring them that each soul is moving forward in its own timing, propelled by God's Love and Will. He encourages them to embrace the unexpected, to meet challenges with courage, and to trust that life's constant movement and change is itself the mechanism of soul growth and service. | Life conspires to bring growth. It is not stale and static but full of movement and openings |
| [God's Love Awakens the Gifts of the Soul](messages/2018/01/2018-01-29-af-john-the-beloved.md) | John the Beloved | Al Fike | 2018‑01‑29 | Prism of the Soul, The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | John the Beloved teaches that within each soul God has planted a unique garden of gifts and potentials awaiting germination through the Light of Divine Love. He urges each soul to look within, honour its own unique beauty, and express its gifts freely rather than copying another, for as each soul's lantern is lit, it will draw and awaken others until the whole world is alight. | God has planted a whole universe within you. It takes only one prayer to begin bringing it alive |
| [Allow the Soul to Have Its Say](messages/2018/03/2018-03-02-af-andrew.md) | Andrew | Al Fike | 2018‑03‑02 | Mind & Soul, Letters from History, The Saints & Apostles Speak | Core Teaching, Spirit Biography | Andrew responds to the group's conversation about discernment and guidance, teaching that even sincere souls receive impressions coloured by their own condition, and that the soul's wisdom must be allowed to rise above the mind's calculations. He shares the remarkable personal account of his own journey from the Celestial Heavens to the Hells to help his brother Judas, and draws from it the lesson that listening to the soul's urgings rather than the mind's judgements brings the greatest blessings and the most good. | I could have left my brother in the darkness. Instead I listened to the yearnings of my soul, and I was blessed the most |
| [Knowing the Potentials of God's Love Is an Infinite Journey](messages/2018/03/2018-03-08-af-seretta-kem.md) | Seretta Kem | Al Fike | 2018‑03‑08 | Healing Path |  | Seretta Kem welcomes two new souls into the circle and speaks of the infinite unfolding of God's Love, teaching that even Celestial spirits continue to discover new wonders within it. He encourages those gathered to trust that their connection with God is unbreakable and ever-expanding, and that each soul carries unique gifts and purposes that will emerge as they grow in Love. | Even those in the Celestial Kingdom do not know all the wonders of God's Love. It continues to unfold for them as it does for you |
| [You Come Close to Your Soul's Awakening](messages/2018/03/2018-03-11-af-jesus.md) | Jesus of Nazareth | Al Fike | 2018‑03‑11 | Jesus Speaks |  | Jesus comes to bless those gathered, affirming their strength and commitment to bringing Truth to the world, reassuring them that their work has far-reaching effects they cannot see, and telling them they are drawing close to the realization of their true selves and the awakening of their souls. | You cannot see the far-reaching effects of your work. But the strength and love and faith of those like you brings hope to this world |
| [In God's Love You Have Found Your Sanctuary of Light](messages/2018/03/2018-03-13-af-jesus.md) | Jesus of Nazareth | Al Fike | 2018‑03‑13 | Jesus Speaks |  | Jesus pours out a blessing upon those gathered, affirming that God carries them in His embrace, that simple faith and prayer are all that is required to know God's guidance, and that in their service and humility they will find grace. He promises that the flow of Living Waters into their souls will become endless as they awaken, and that the work of bringing Love to a darkened world has already begun within them. | God does not limit you. God releases you. He releases your true self so that you may truly be that unique being that you are |
| [Become the Winds of Change](messages/2018/03/2018-03-26-af-james.md) | James | Al Fike | 2018‑03‑26 | Awakening Humanity, The Saints & Apostles Speak | Prophecy | James urges those gathered to feel the winds of change already moving in the world and to open themselves to God's Touch so that they may become part of that change. He speaks of storms coming that will bring what is required to uplift humanity, calls each soul to put aside doubt and fear and step forward in innocent faith, and invites all to accept God's invitation to Light, awakening, and the realization of their deepest potentials. | The winds of change are coming. Are you willing to accept what is coming with joy, and be the change that God wishes for all humanity to be? |
| [Sins of the Parents](messages/2018/04/2018-04-03-af-luke.md) | Luke | Al Fike | 2018‑04‑03 | Mind & Soul, The Saints & Apostles Speak | Core Teaching | Luke responds to a question about the biblical concept of sins being visited upon future generations, explaining in detail how conditions of fear, anger, confusion, and error are transmitted from parent to child beginning in the womb. He teaches that these inherited conditions accumulate over thousands of years of human history, but that the power of Divine Love is the great healer that can break the chain - washing through the soul, cleansing conditions, and empowering each soul to step out of the inherited darkness and into Light. | You chose Light. You chose to step away from the conditions so steadfast in your world. This is a testimony to the strength of your soul |
| [A Great Journey Awaits](messages/2018/05/2018-05-04-af-yogananda.md) | Yogananda | Al Fike | 2018‑05‑04 | Letters from History, Service & Mission |  | Yogananda speaks personally to one member of the circle, affirming that God has orchestrated every experience of his life to bring him to this point of readiness for service. He promises a great journey ahead - as teacher, healer, wanderer, and minstrel - drawing parallels to his own journey from India to America, and assuring this soul that many celestial helpers will accompany him as the path opens and revelation follows revelation. | Everything has led to this point. From this point many things will flow in harmony. You will not have to struggle to find your way - the path will open |
| [Walk in Harmony With God's Will](messages/2018/05/2018-05-09-af-alec-gaunt.md) | Alec Gaunt | Al Fike | 2018‑05‑09 | Mind & Soul, Letters from History | Core Teaching, Spirit Biography | Alec Gaunt teaches that knowing God's Will requires not effort and exertion but faith, peace, patience, and trust, and that life is a creative cooperation between human choice and God's Will rather than a preordained script. He draws on his own Earth life experience, confessing that he pushed too hard and passed into spirit sooner than he should have, urging those gathered to walk the fine line of balance between self-will and God's Will with greater patience and wisdom than he managed. | Life is not preordained. It is a cooperation between you and God - a creative flow that combines your choice and God's Will together in harmony |
| [Change Comes One Soul at a Time](messages/2018/05/2018-05-10-af-gandhi.md) | Mahatma Gandhi | Al Fike | 2018‑05‑10 | Awakening Humanity, Letters from History | Core Teaching, Spirit Biography | Gandhi responds to the group's contemplation of the world's darkness and inequities, teaching that true change in the world begins with the individual soul and its reconciliation with God. He draws on his own Earth life, speaking of how one step led to another as he followed God's guidance, and urges those gathered not to be overwhelmed by the complexity of the world's problems but to trust that their awakening souls will reveal the role they must play. | You look at all the dilemmas of this world and throw up your arms. But it is your awakened soul that will find the role you must play. One step at a time |
| [This Is a Place of Refuge](messages/2018/05/2018-05-11-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2018‑05‑11 | Service & Mission, The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Augustine blesses a physical gathering place as a refuge ordained by God for many to come and receive His Love. He calls those gathered to continue opening their doors to all who seek solace and peace, to encourage others to pray and join their circles of Light, and to trust that all pain and heartache will fall away as the power of God's Love continues its deep healing work within them. | Open your doors. Let those who come feel the peace. In time they will carry this Light and create their own refuge wherever they are |
| [Law of Compensation: Natural Compared with the Divine Path](messages/2018/05/2018-05-12-af-luke.md) | Luke | Al Fike | 2018‑05‑12 | Two Paths, The Saints & Apostles Speak | Core Teaching | Luke delivers a detailed teaching on the Law of Compensation, explaining the two distinct ways in which the soul's accumulated conditions of darkness must be reconciled. On the natural love path, each condition must be consciously addressed one by one. On the Divine Love path, God's Essence acts as a powerful healing force that neutralizes these conditions reflexively, bringing forgetfulness rather than reliving. He contrasts the sixth sphere of natural love with the Celestial Kingdom, and teaches that at-onement with God is only possible through the Divine Love path. | The Law of Compensation insists that every dark condition in your soul be reconciled and brought to Light. Divine Love does this not consciously but as a reflexive response to God's Touch within you |
| [60/40 Soul Mind Guidance](messages/2018/05/2018-05-17-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2018‑05‑17 | Mind & Soul, The Saints & Apostles Speak | Core Teaching | Augustine clarifies a previous message in which he gave a 60/40 soul/mind ratio as guidance, explaining that the goal is not a fixed percentage but the dominance of soul consciousness over the mind - not replacing it. Using the metaphor of mixing yellow and red paint to make a sunset orange, he teaches that the soul and mind must work together with the soul as the predominant factor, and that this harmonious intermingling deepens perception, opens soul faculties, and brings a new way of being in the world. | The goal is not soul or mind. It is a beautiful orange - predominantly soul, but with the mind mixed in to create something harmonious and whole |
| [Make Arrangements to Come Together](messages/2018/05/2018-05-20-af-keea-atta-kem.md) | Keea Atta Kem | Al Fike | 2018‑05‑20 |  |  | Keea atta Kem encourages the circle to make concrete arrangements to come together physically, teaching that while individual spiritual development continues in each soul's daily life, there are gifts and awakenings that can only be forged when the group gathers in the flesh - for the spiritual melding of souls in physical proximity multiplies the possibilities of upliftment far beyond what is possible apart. | When you are together in love and harmony, sitting and praying in the flesh, the possibilities of awakening are far greater than when you are apart |
| [Awaken to the Greater Love](messages/2018/05/2018-05-21-af-matthew.md) | Matthew | Al Fike | 2018‑05‑21 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Matthew opens with a prayer of blessing for those gathered, then affirms that each soul is drawn to seek the greater Love of God by the longings of the soul itself. He encourages those gathered to drink deeply of God's blessings in this moment of prayer, reminding them that God's Love is always available, never withheld, and that as the soul awakens it will come to know God in a rich and full understanding. | Those parts of you that have lain dormant for many years are now eager for the light of day. They come from your soul |
| [Live Each Day in the Flow of God's Will and Love for You](messages/2018/05/2018-05-28-af-andrew.md) | Andrew | Al Fike | 2018‑05‑28 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Andrew blesses those gathered with the assurance that the world is opening to them, that God will carry them to many places to bring Light and Truth, and urges them to release all restrictions and concerns about the future and simply live each day in the flow of God's Will and Love. | Do not place before you any restrictions as to where God will take you. Live each day in the flow and beauty of His Will |
| [Be Part of the Plan for the Salvation of Mankind](messages/2018/05/2018-05-28-af-jesus.md) | Jesus of Nazareth | Al Fike | 2018‑05‑28 | Jesus Speaks |  | Jesus blesses those gathered, affirming that they are part of God's great plan for the salvation of mankind and a growing association of souls of Light that is coalescing into a movement to push back darkness. He assures them that each prayer to be used as an instrument of God's Will is answered, that each step forward brings them to a higher place of knowing, and that God's Hand is surely upon them and will never leave. | You just begin this journey. And yet already you are part of a great association of souls of Light coalescing into a movement that will push back the darkness |
| [Receiving the Love of God Brings Both Pain and Joy](messages/2018/05/2018-05-28-af-matthew.md) | Matthew | Al Fike | 2018‑05‑28 | Mind & Soul, The Saints & Apostles Speak | Core Teaching | Matthew traces the soul's journey from the natural awareness of childhood, through its burial under layers of conditioning, fear, and mental patterns, to the path back through prayer and emotional release. He teaches that the soul cannot be known through mental processes but only through heartfelt longing directed toward God, and that when the soul is finally allowed to open, waves of grief, longing, and desire will reach God and receive in return a healing and awakening beyond anything the mind can produce. | The innocent child knows its own soul naturally. Then the world buries it. Your whole spiritual journey is simply learning to find it again |
| [Transitioning from Mind to Soul](messages/2018/06/2018-06-04-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2018‑06‑04 | Mind & Soul, The Saints & Apostles Speak | Core Teaching | Augustine responds to a question by explaining the confusion and discomfort of the transition from mind-dominated to soul-dominated awareness. He teaches that within each person are two minds - one of the soul and one of the material mind - and that as the soul grows stronger, conflict arises in the in-between place where they collide. He urges those gathered to recognize this conflict as a sign of readiness, not failure, and to take the leap of faith toward soul dominance that God is inviting them to make. | The soul is stronger. The soul knows. And the soul needs to forge ahead - to realize its purpose in this life, and to serve God in Love |
| [The Blessing of a Shield of Light](messages/2018/06/2018-06-06-af-jesus.md) | Jesus of Nazareth | Al Fike | 2018‑06‑06 | Jesus Speaks |  | Jesus announces that each member of the circle has received a unique blessing of a shield of white and golden Light from God, enveloping and protecting them as they carry Light into the world. He assures them this gift will never leave them but will grow and expand with each prayer and act of service, helping them to be in the world but not of the world, and enabling the angels to work through them more effectively. | You have each received a unique blessing - a shield of Light that envelops you. It will never leave you, and it will grow |
| [Seek to Know God Through Love](messages/2018/06/2018-06-09-af-john-the-beloved.md) | John the Beloved | Al Fike | 2018‑06‑09 | The Saints & Apostles Speak | Core Teaching | John the Beloved speaks to a gathering that includes seekers from afar, teaching that just as bees seek nectar, the soul longs for God's Love to sustain it. He calls those gathered to lay down the preconceptions of the mind and allow God to touch the soul directly, promising that as the soul awakens in Love, even the mind will be satisfied and appeased by the Truths that emerge. He closes with God's personal invitation to each soul: will you accept my Love? | 'God places His Hand upon you and asks: Will you accept my Love? Even when your soul truly knows me, I shall continue to bless you' |
| [All Truth Begins with the Soul Awakened in Love](messages/2018/06/2018-06-09-af-john-wesley.md) | John Wesley | Al Fike | 2018‑06‑09 | Letters from History, Mind & Soul, Awakening Humanity | Core Teaching, Historical, Spirit Biography | John Wesley, founder of Methodism and now an inhabitant of the Celestial Kingdom, speaks urgently about humanity's need to awaken from the illusions of the mind before it is too late. He teaches that the material mind cannot solve the great dilemmas of humanity, that all truth begins with Love, and that only the soul awakened in Divine Love can truly perceive God's Creation and become an instrument of change in the world. | All Truth begins with Love. For Love is what makes the universe what it is. It brings life |
| [The Soul Longs for the Touch of God](messages/2018/06/2018-06-09-af-matthew.md) | Matthew | Al Fike | 2018‑06‑09 | Mind & Soul, The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Matthew speaks to a gathering that includes newcomers, teaching that though each person may have a different mental explanation for why they have come, the truth is that the soul itself has drawn them - quietly seeking the Source of all, compelled by a longing so deep the mind often cannot name it. He urges those gathered to recognize this longing, nurture it consciously in prayer, and trust that seeking God above all else will bring every other blessing in its wake. | The soul seeks until it finds. It quietly goes about its business, seeking the Source of all. And it has brought you here |
| [The Reality of the Soul Can Be Merged with the Mind](messages/2018/06/2018-06-18-af-matthew.md) | Matthew | Al Fike | 2018‑06‑18 | Mind & Soul, The Saints & Apostles Speak | Core Teaching | Matthew teaches that within each person are two minds - the material mind and the soul mind - each perceiving a different reality. The material mind is shaped by the thought conditions of the world and the five senses, while the soul mind is ignited and sustained by Divine Love. He calls those gathered to be scientists of the soul, accepting the challenge of merging these two realities into a new and more complete perception of God's Creation - and assures them that the veil will lift and the true reality will take form as the soul continues to awaken. | You are scientists of the soul, discovering its mysteries. The vanguards of a new dawn of Love and Truth that God intends for this world |
| [Seek Humility and Compassion for Self and Others](messages/2018/06/2018-06-24-af-luke.md) | Luke | Al Fike | 2018‑06‑24 | Mind & Soul, Healing Path, The Saints & Apostles Speak | Core Teaching | Luke responds to a question from one in the circle, delivering a searching and compassionate teaching on judgment, humility, and the courage required for radical self-honesty. He teaches that when we perceive error in another and respond with judgment rather than compassion, we are falling into the mind's patterns of superiority - and that the path forward requires deep honesty about our own conditions, the willingness to bare our hearts to one another, and trust that God's Love will heal everything we are willing to bring to Him. | When another hurts you, the most powerful response is forgiveness. When you react intensely to another's behaviour, that condition lives in you too - and their gift is to show you |
| [Release Judgment, Embrace Love](messages/2018/06/2018-06-26-af-matthew.md) | Matthew | Al Fike | 2018‑06‑26 | Mind & Soul, Healing Path, The Saints & Apostles Speak | Core Teaching | Matthew continues the theme of Luke's previous message, teaching that beneath judgment and anger almost always lies a deep hurt of feeling unloved and unrecognized. He teaches that authentic love cannot be performed while carrying hidden resentment, that this gap between surface and inner reality is why the world is so dark, and that each day God places before each soul the test and opportunity to choose love over the old patterns of the mind - one rung at a time up the ladder of Light. | You will know when you have passed the test. When you gaze upon one who has challenged you and find love, compassion, and forgiveness - you have become stronger in Light |
| [A Blessing from Mary](messages/2018/07/2018-07-02-af-mary.md) | Mary | Al Fike | 2018‑07‑02 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Mary blesses those gathered who carry responsibilities for the elderly, children, and those who are weak, promising to be with them as they serve.
